title: AI Solutions Architect (Transformation Lead)
reasons:
- Inspired Leadership Team and Talented Colleagues
- Attractive Salary and Benefits
- Hybrid mode available and flexible working time
jobDescription:
AI-Native Engineering Practice - Technical Ownership:

- Own and continuously evolve KMS's AI-native SDLC operating model at KMS: agent workflow designs, verification gates, context management standards, and eval frameworks
- Build and lead multi-agent systems using orchestration layers such as Claude Code, GitHub Copilot Workspace, Cursor, LangGraph, CrewAI, or equivalent — from prototype to production
- In collaboration with the Director of Engineering, contribute to and help maintain KMS's AI toolchain selection criteria — evaluating tools with engineering rigor, not hype — and publishing internal guidance on when AI helps and when it hurts
- Establish prompt engineering standards, agent evaluation (evals) loops, and AI output quality gates across the delivery organization

Capability & Standards Leadership

- Prior experience in a lead, principal, or staff engineer role with demonstrated cross-team influence
- Experience in outsourcing, consulting, or multi-client delivery environments
- Track record of building or leading an internal community of practice, guild, or AI adoption program
- Develop and continuously evolve KMS's AI-native SDLC playbook — standards, workflow templates, case studies, and guardrails that delivery teams can adopt immediately
- Design and lead internal upskilling programs (workshops, pairing) that move engineers from AI-assisted to AI-native working patterns
- Track the AI capability frontier — model improvements, new agent frameworks, emerging risks — and translate signals into timely updates to KMS's practices

Client Delivery

- Work closely alongside KMS Delivery Teams — as an AI transformation advisor and execution partner — identifying the highest-value automation opportunities across the SDLC and coordinating with the team to bring them to life
- Design and deploy agent-orchestrated workflows tailored to each client's stack, team maturity, and delivery context — with measurable ROI
- Build business cases for AI-native adoption with clients and account managers, framing the value in terms of velocity, quality, and cost
- Represent KMS's AI-native engineering capabilities in client conversations, QBRs, and RFP responses — acting as a credible technical authority
requirements:
Core Engineering Foundation

- 8+ years of professional software engineering, with a proven track record of leading technical initiatives that span multiple teams or systems
- Deep hands-on experience across the full SDLC: from requirements and architecture through testing, deployment, and production operations
- Demonstrated ability to lead technical direction — setting standards, reviewing architecture decisions, and influencing without direct authority
- Strong command of software architecture principles: system decomposition, API design, scalability, observability, and failure mode reasoning
- Proficiency in at least one primary language: Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, Java, .Net or Go — with experience across multiple layers of the stack

AI & Agentic Systems Fluency

- Proven, production-grade experience with AI coding agents as a core part of your daily workflow
- Strong understanding of LLM API integration in production: context window management, latency and cost tradeoffs, model selection criteria, fallback strategies, and output reliability patterns
- Experience or strong interest in multi-agent orchestration patterns: task decomposition, agent communication, tool use, memory, and eval loops
- Working knowledge of RAG architectures, embedding strategies, and how to ground AI agents in domain-specific, proprietary knowledge bases
- Ability to design and run AI evals: you can define quality metrics, build evaluation datasets, detect regressions, and use quantitative signals to improve agent behaviour over time

Nice to have

- Experience with agentic frameworks: LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, or similar orchestration patterns
- MLOps knowledge: model deployment, monitoring, drift detection, A/B testing in production
- Proficient daily use of AI coding tools (Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code) across the full SDLC
- Able to decompose complex tasks, provide effective context, and apply chain-of-thought and multi-step prompting workflows
- Experience with agentic workflows and AI-driven development frameworks
- Hands-on experience integrating AI tools with other systems via MCP (Model Context Protocol) or equivalent
- Awareness of emerging AI tools and willingness to evaluate and adopt new capabilities
benefits:
Perks You'll Enjoy

- Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam
- Building large-scale & global software products
- Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team
- Diverse career opportunities with Software Services, Software Product Development, IT Solutions & Consulting
- Flexible working time
- Various training on hot-trend technologies, best practices and soft skills
- Company trip, big year-end party, team building, etc.
- Fitness & sport activities: football, tennis, table tennis, badminton, yoga, swimming…
- Joining community development activities: 1% Pledge, charity every quarter, blood donation, public seminars, career orientation talks,…
- Free in-house entertainment facilities (foosball, ping pong, gym…), coffee, and snacks (instant noodles, cookies, candies…)

And much more, join us and let yourself explore other fantastic things!

title: Senior Security Engineer
reasons:
- Top European Firm, AI & Digital Bank Leaders
- Attractive Pay, 13th Month & Performance Bonus
- Hybrid Work, Premium Health & Extensive Leave
jobDescription:
Role Summary

ITviec's client is seeking a highly skilled and hands-on Senior Security Engineer with a strong focus on secure coding and automation (Python) to join our Service Operations team. This role is ideal for engineers who are passionate about building secure, scalable systems, integrating security into development workflows, and supporting banking/financial domain applications in a cloud-native (AWS) environment.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain security automation tools and scripts using Python to support application security and DevSecOps processes
- Perform secure code reviews across platforms (Kotlin, Node.js, Android, iOS, Python), with strong emphasis on Python-based systems
- Integrate and automate security controls into CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions)
- Work closely with engineering teams to embed secure coding practices into the SDLC
- Implement and manage SAST/SCA/DAST tools and automate vulnerability detection and remediation workflows
- Support API and application security (REST, GraphQL), including authentication, authorization, and encryption practices
- Conduct basic penetration testing and vulnerability validation (mobile, web, APIs) – depth is not required, focus is on remediation and automation
- Perform threat modelling (e.g., STRIDE) and risk assessment for applications, especially in banking systems
- Collaborate with infrastructure teams to ensure secure deployment on AWS cloud environments
- Contribute to application security standards, policies, and best practices aligned with OWASP
- Monitor and respond to emerging security threats, including risks related to AI-enabled systems
- Support BAU security operations, vulnerability management, and continuous improvement initiatives
requirements:
- 7+ years of hands-on experience in Python development (mandatory, strong coding capability is critical)
- 8 years of experience in application security/DevSecOps
- Experience working in banking/financial services domain
- Strong experience with AWS cloud services and cloud security practices
- Solid understanding of secure coding practices and code review methodologies
- Experience integrating security tools into CI/CD pipelines
- Familiarity with SAST/SCA/DAST tools
- Basic understanding of penetration testing concepts and tools (e.g., Burp Suite, MobSF, Frida)
- Knowledge of API security, authentication mechanisms, and cryptographic fundamentals
- Experience working in Agile/DevOps environments

Nice-to-Have

- Experience with security automation frameworks and tooling in Python
- Exposure to AI/ML application security (e.g., prompt injection, model abuse)
- Certifications such as AWS Security Specialty, CSSLP, OSCP (optional)
- Experience with container security (Docker, Kubernetes) and IaC scanning
- Familiarity with banking security standards and compliance requirements
benefits:
Our client is a prominent European-based technology consultancy with over 30 years of global expertise in digital transformation. They specialize in engineering next-generation core systems and high-scale data solutions for industry leaders within the Financial Services, Insurance, and Manufacturing sectors. Operating a robust network across more than 20 countries, the firm is at the forefront of integrating advanced automation and modern engineering workflows into the software development lifecycle. With a strong commitment to technical excellence and a distributed global delivery model, they offer senior experts the chance to lead complex modernization initiatives. This is an ideal environment for those looking to influence the future of digital banking and large-scale enterprise architecture.

Why You'll Love Working With Us

- Global Innovation Hub: Be part of a prestigious European technology firm with a 30-year legacy, working on large-scale digital transformation projects for top-tier global financial institutions.
- Cutting-Edge Tech Stack: Engage with an AI-centric environment where you are encouraged to leverage advanced AI-assisted development tools (like GitHub Copilot and Claude Code) to redefine engineering productivity.
- Expert Collaboration: Work alongside some of the industry's brightest minds in an international setting that fosters professional growth and cultural exchange.
- Continuous Upskilling: Access specialized training programs, including professional English courses and advanced certifications in Cloud, Architecture, and emerging technologies like Smart Contracts.
- Competitive & Transparent Rewards: Enjoy a robust compensation package featuring a guaranteed 13th-month salary, performance-based bonuses, and premium health insurance for your peace of mind.
- Work-Life Balance: Benefit from a flexible Hybrid working model and extensive annual leave, allowing you to balance professional excellence with personal well-being.
- High-Impact Projects: Direct your expertise toward modernizing next-generation core systems that power the daily lives of millions in the banking and fintech sectors.

jobDescription:
Core Platform & Architecture Security

- Design and implement Secure Boot, Chain of Trust, Measured Boot
- Define and maintain Root of Trust (RoT) / Platform Root of Trust
- Develop and integrate Trusted Execution Environment (TEE)

Runtime Protection & Isolation

- Ensure process/thread isolation and memory protection: MPU, MMU, SMMU
requirements:

- Solid knowledge of:- Embedded cybersecurity- Cryptography fundamentals (PKI, TLS, key management)- Hardware-based security mechanisms
- Soft Skills:- Strong system-level thinking and problem-solving skills- Ability to work across hardware, OS, and application teams- Good communication skills in English- Ability to work in complex, safety-critical environments

title: Principal Software Engineer (Ruby on Rails/Golang/AI)
reasons:
- Hybrid working; Flexible time; Macbook Pro
- L&D programs; 17 days off
- 13.7 million B2C users; 140,000+ business customer
jobDescription:
As a Product Engineer, you will drive outcomes across the team and technical system by leading design, implementation, rollout, and operational excellence. You will work primarily in our Ruby on Rails codebase to deliver product features end-to-end. We also have services written in Go (Golang), and you may occasionally contribute fixes or improvements there when needed.

Key Responsibilities

1. Technical Leadership

- Ruby on Rails: Design, develop, and operate backend features in a Ruby on Rails and core services, with strong software engineering fundamentals and pragmatic delivery.
- API & Services: Design and evolve RESTful APIs and service boundaries with clear tradeoffs and maintainable interfaces.
- Data & Performance: Model data effectively and optimize SQL performance; identify and address bottlenecks and system inefficiencies.
- Cloud-Native Delivery: Architect and operate cloud-native applications on AWS (and related tooling) with pragmatic use of Docker/Kubernetes where appropriate.
- Operational Excellence: Improve observability (logs/metrics/traces), incident response, and post-incident learning to raise system reliability.

2. Delivery Ownership & Cross-Functional Collaboration

- End-to-end Delivery: Own delivery from problem definition through production rollout, ensuring quality and operational readiness.
- Stakeholder Collaboration: Partner with Product, Design, QA, and DevOps to clarify requirements, reduce ambiguity, and deliver outcomes aligned to business goals.
- Release Management: Plan and execute production releases, coordinate stakeholders, and continuously improve deployment safety and speed (CI/CD)

3. Engineering Excellence & Quality

- Code Quality: Set and model best practices for clean, maintainable code; lead strong code review culture.
- Testing & Automation: Increase confidence and reduce manual testing via effective automated tests and robust review processes.
- CI/CD: Operate and improve CI/CD pipelines (CircleCI/GitHub Actions or similar) to support frequent and safe delivery.
- Security & Scalability: Ensure AI-assisted speed never compromises security, privacy, scalability, or compliance requirements.

4. AI-Assisted Delivery Practices

- Rapid Iteration: Use AI to speed up prototyping and iteration (requirements exploration, code scaffolding, test generation, refactoring).
- Verification & Governance: Quickly identify flaws in AI-generated output and correct them; maintain strong human verification habits (testing, reviews, threat modeling).
- AI-Friendly Documentation: Improve the clarity of logs, runbooks, and technical documentation so both humans and AI tools can understand and operate the system effectively.

Scope & Collaboration

- Primary focus is Rails-first backend/API delivery, with pragmatic cross-functional reach (infra/observability/quality) as needed to unblock outcomes.
- You will collaborate across time zones with global stakeholders and engineering partners.
requirements:
Required Skills & Competencies

- Experience: 5+ years of software engineering experience, including significant experience building and operating production web applications.
- Ruby on Rails: Strong proficiency with Ruby on Rails (or a strong willingness and demonstrated ability to ramp up quickly and work day-to-day in a Rails codebase).
- Distributed Systems: Experience designing and operating web services and microservices in production environments.
- Cloud: Strong hands-on experience with AWS and cloud-native development practices.
- Databases: Deep knowledge of relational databases and practical experience with data modeling and SQL performance tuning.
- Delivery Leadership: Demonstrated ability to lead projects end-to-end and coordinate releases across stakeholders.
- Collaboration: Strong communication and ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams.
- Language: Professional English proficiency for global collaboration.

Preferred Skills

- Kubernetes/EKS experience in production.
- Monitoring/logging experience (e.g., Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK).
- Message brokers/event-driven architectures (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ).
- Experience integrating LLM APIs into products or internal tools (prompting, async workflows, handling non-deterministic outputs).

Technology Stack

- Languages: Ruby on Rails (core), Go (selected services)
- Datastores: MySQL, DynamoDB, Redis
- Infrastructure: AWS (EKS, ECR, RDS, S3, SQS/SNS), Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform

Tools Used

- Communication: Slack, Notion, Zoom
- Monitoring: Datadog, Rollbar
- Source control: GitHub
- CI/CD: Argo CD, CircleCI, GitHub Actions
- Ticketing: Jira
- Security: Dependabot, SonarQube

title: Senior Data Security - Data Division
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription:
2026TD450980 - Chuyên viên cao cấp Bảo mật dữ liệu - Khối Dữ liệu

1. Mục tiêu công việc:

Thực hiện các hoạt động liên quan đến xây dựng và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu, đảm bảo an toàn, tuân thủ và bảo vệ dữ liệu trong suốt vòng đời, theo quy định pháp luật và tiêu chuẩn quốc tế (Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP, ISO 27001, GDPR...).Phối hợp với các đơn vị Quản trị dữ liệu, An ninh thông tin, Rủi ro và Tuân thủ để triển khai hiệu quả các chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn và công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu trong phạm vi được phân công, góp phần đảm bảo hoạt động quản trị dữ liệu toàn hàng được vận hành liên tục, an toàn và hiệu quả.2. Nhiệm vụ/trách nhiệm chính:i. Thiết kế và triển khai Data Security Framework thống nhất trên toàn tổ chức.ii. Quản lý các hoạt động bảo mật dữ liệu theo vòng đời dữ liệu (data lifecycle):• Phân loại và gắn nhãn dữ liệu (Data Classification & Tagging)• Mã hóa và quản lý khóa (Encryption & Key Management)• Ẩn danh, che dấu dữ liệu (Masking, Tokenization)• Quản lý truy cập và phân quyền (Access Control, IAM, ABAC/RBAC)• Giám sát và phát hiện rò rỉ dữ liệu (DLP, Monitoring, Incident Response)iii. Xây dựng và cập nhật chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn bảo mật dữ liệu, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị IT Security, Data Governance, QTRR và Tuân thủ.iv. Tham gia triển khai, đánh giá và kiểm soát tuân thủ các quy định pháp luật về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân và bảo mật thông tin.v. Đào tạo, nâng cao nhận thức về bảo mật dữ liệu cho các đơn vị kinh doanh và kỹ thuật.vi. Xây dựng báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình an ninh dữ liệu, cảnh báo sớm rủi ro và kế hoạch cải thiện cho Ban Lãnh đạo.
requirements:
i. Trình độ & kinh nghiệm• Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, An toàn thông tin, Khoa học dữ liệu, hoặc tương đương.• Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong các lĩnh vực: Information Security, Data Governance, IT Risk, hoặc Cloud Security.• Hiểu biết về các tiêu chuẩn và khung kiểm soát bảo mật dữ liệu: ISO 27001/27701, NIST, GDPR, PCI-DSS, Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP.• Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hoặc quản lý các công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu: DLP, Data Masking, Encryption, IAM, SIEM, Key Vault, Cloud Security Tools.ii. Kỹ năng• Khả năng thiết kế và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu ở cấp tổ chức.• Tư duy data-centric security, cân bằng giữa bảo mật và hiệu quả kinh doanh.• Kỹ năng điều phối liên phòng ban, giao tiếp tốt, và ra quyết định nhanh trong tình huống sự cố.• Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ quốc tế: CISSP, CISM, CDPSE, ISO 27001 LA/LI, CDMP Practitioner, CISA.• SQL, các công cụ BI

title: Test Developer (C#, Python, Linux, IP Networking)
jobDescription:
The Appliance Release Readiness Team at Motorola are responsible for validating, automating, and performance testing platforms that are used to deploy our world-class Avigilon Control Center software product and other cloud based technologies.

Leverage your expertise in a dynamic and innovative environment, leading projects that make a real-world impact, and collaborating with a talented and supportive team.

Join us at Motorola Solutions and be part of a team that's making a difference in the world of safety and security!

Responsibilities include:

- Define and continually improve the quality of Avigilon’s software and hardware products through the ownership and maintenance of comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test automation.
- Work with other teams to ensure that Avigilon produces the highest quality, easiest to use products in the surveillance industry.
- Design, measure, and report on the performance of various components of our system.
- Proactively identify and develop strategies to mitigate performance bottlenecks.
- Conduct exploratory testing on new features and platforms, specifically related to AI use cases.
- Develop, document, and maintain internal tools to aid testing and development teams.
- Lead the verification of resolution for complex defects and customer support issues.
- Mentor junior team members and co-ops on technical skills and best practices.

#R65088
requirements:
Required Qualifications:

- Excellent written and oral communication skills, including the ability to produce clear, concise documentation.
- Exceptional problem solving and critical thinking skills.
- Proven ability to work independently and drive projects to completion.
- Ability to work as part of a cross-functional team, often in a lead capacity.
- Strong proficiency in C#, Powershell, Python, Linux/Shell, and IP Networking.
- Bachelor in Science or equivalent degree in a technical related discipline.

Preferred Experience:

- Proven knowledge of general computer items like: RAID, BIOS, Firmware, PCIe, etc.
- Prior experience installing and configuring NVR’s, computers or network equipment.
- In-depth knowledge of client/server architectures.
- Experience with image/video file formats and related concepts.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law
- The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination
- Award for marriage, newborn
- We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year
- You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path
- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active
- We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,...
- Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

title: Sr Technical Expert - Automotive HPC Embedded Platforms
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
In this position, you lead the technical team and ensure delivery of software for high‑performance computing (HPC) platforms in automotive, covering real‑time core and application‑core–based software stacks.

You act as a technical expert with strong technical and management skills, responsible for Quality, Cost, and Delivery (Q‑C‑D) while working closely with global engineering teams and driving local engineering execution.

Key Responsibilities:

- Define technical direction and platform architecture for automotive HPC embedded stacks (Linux/QNX/Android).
- Lead end-to-end delivery and integration; ensure Q-C-D targets.
- Mentor engineers and drive design/code reviews and complex problem solving.
- Align with global teams and stakeholders on roadmap, interfaces, and integration.
- wn bring-up, verification, validation and performance optimization, handle escalations and risks.
requirements:
Educational and Experience

- Completed university degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Systems Engineering, or a related technical field.
- Strong senior‑level experience in embedded/system software development, with responsibility in technical lead roles (10+ years)

Skills

- Comfortable in a dynamic, fast-paced environment with changing priorities.
- Proactive, self-organized, and accountable for outcomes.
- Structured, creative problem solving for complex system issues.
- Strong collaboration and stakeholder management; continuous improvement mindset.
- Hands-on approach; able to dive into technical details to support teams.
- Strong analytical/root-cause analysis skills; able to explain complex topics to customers and stakeholders.
- Experience improving engineering processes and delivery efficiency (e.g., CI/CD, quality gates).
- Business fluent English, both written and spoken

Know-how

- Extensive development experience on Linux and QNX (POSIX environments).
- Strong Linux systems know-how (kernel / user-space), including driver and performance analysis.
- Proficient with debugging tools (e.g., GDB, Lauterbach).
- Experience delivering ADAS and or IVI series-development software on microprocessor-based platforms.
- Expertise with high-speed interfaces (PCIe, Ethernet).
- Familiar with hypervisor/virtualization technologies.
- AI/ML deployment know-how (tool chains, compilers, optimization) on Embedded/HPC platforms.
- Experience with requirements engineering, continuous integration of SW and relevant tool chains (e.g., Codebeamer, …).

Nice-to-have:

- General knowledge in functional safety (ISO 26262) and security principles (SAE 21434)
- Understanding of E/E (Electrical/Electronic) automotive architectures, particularly for ADAS (Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems) and infotainment systems.
benefits:
Why BOSCH?

Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work.

Benefits and Career Opportunities

- Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam and Top 30 of the Most Innovative Companies all over the world
- Join in a dynamic and fast-growing global company (English-speaking environment), with opportunity to work in global projects and being a part of innovation team contributing initiative ideas to the hi-tech world
- Onsite opportunities: short-term and long-term assignments in worldwide offices
- Engage in our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism
- 13th-month salary bonus + attractive performance bonus (you'll love it!) + annual performance appraisal
- 100% offered salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation
- 15++ days of annual leave + 1-day of birthday leave
- Premium health insurance for employee and 02 family members
- Flexible working time and working model
- Lunch and parking allowance
- Good benefits of company activities such as: football, badminton, yoga, Aerobic, team building…

title: Cloud DevOps Engineer (CDS) (Open For Freshers)
reasons:
- Salary and bonus based on ability
- Young and fun working environment
- Opportunities to study and work abroad.
jobDescription:
- Implement, operate, maintain, and troubleshoot Linux and Windows operating systems for cloud systems.
- Monitor and analyze OS-level indicators such as CPU, memory, disk/filesystem usage, and processes to ensure system stability and performance.
- Configure, operate, and manage cloud infrastructure resources including AWS EC2, Application Load Balancer (ALB), Security Groups, and related services.
- Configure, monitor, and respond to events using AWS CloudWatch Logs, Metrics, Alarms, and monitoring dashboards.
- Design, build, and maintain AWS CloudWatch Dashboards to track key operational and performance metrics.
- Develop, operate, and maintain AWS Lambda functions and OS-level automation scripts (Shell, PowerShell) to improve operational efficiency.
- Perform infrastructure and security health checks, including reviewing and resolving recommendations from AWS Trusted Advisor.
- Support incident handling, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis for cloud and OS-related issues.
- Create, maintain, and update technical and operational documentation for assigned systems and tasks.
- Collaborate closely with team members to ensure stable, secure, and continuous cloud operations.
- Follow operational standards, security policies, and best practices in cloud environments.
requirements:
[Required]

- Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
- Hands-on experience or strong foundational knowledge of Linux and/or Windows operating systems.
- Ability to monitor systems, analyze issues, and perform troubleshooting at OS and infrastructure levels.
- Basic understanding of cloud environments and infrastructure concepts.
- Knowledge of cloud security fundamentals and best practices.
- Experience with scripting or automation for OS or cloud operations (Shell, PowerShell, or similar).
- Ability to write clear, structured, and concise technical and operational documentation.
- Good teamwork attitude, responsibility, and willingness to learn new technologies.

[Preferred]

- Basic understanding or hands-on experience with public cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
- Experience configuring and operating AWS services including EC2, VPC, IAM, ALB, S3, CloudWatch, and Lambda.
- Experience with monitoring, logging, and alarm configuration in cloud environments.
- Awareness of infrastructure security checks, compliance, and operational controls.
- Candidates who do not fully meet all technical requirements but demonstrate strong learning ability, positive attitude, and growth potential are encouraged to apply.
- Basic English communication skills (TOEIC 550 or equivalent is a plus).
benefits: - Best remuneration: Periodically review and adjust salary once a year, PI bonus twice a. Allowances for lunch, transportation, and phone charges. Party with the team once a. Workshop travel for the whole company once a year. Bonuses/Gifts for holidays, International Labor Day, International Women's Day, etc.- High-class, modern office: 5-star standard office with modern equipment, large rest and entertainment areas (game area, karaoke room, reading room, cafe counter, snack bar, etc.) Meet all members' needs, especially the office has an airy and beautiful view that is among the most beautiful in Hanoi.- Top equipment: Each employee is equipped with the latest generation LG Gram laptop and modern large LG screen.- Best working time: Work 8 hours/day (8:00 ~ 17:00), from Monday to Friday. No pressure to work overtime/weekends!- Flexible, youthful working style: LG CNS Vietnam members are mostly from the 9-10x generation, with a youthful, modern, and fair working style!- Creative environment, valuing individual opinions: With a young and talented team, we always appreciate the creativity and suggestions that members make.- Opportunities to work/study in Korea and abroad: With customers and projects mostly from abroad, your opportunities for training and onsite abroad will always be open!- Other: Happy hours every Friday, Team outing monthly, join clubs like football, badminton, etc...

jobDescription:

- Thực hiện PoC (Proof of Concept), demo giải pháp cho khách hàng cũng như tham gia trực tiếp công việc triển khai và hỗ trợ kỹ thuật trong các dự án sử dụng các giải pháp Storage/Backup.
- Thực hiện hỗ trợ vận hành mức cao: phân tích log, data flow, packet capture, I/O để xử lý root cause trên hệ thống.
- Đào tạo & chuyển giao công nghệ cho khách hàng sau triển khai
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp đại học: An toàn thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Công nghệ thông tin, Điện tử viễn thông, Điện tử truyền thông, … hoặc các chuyên ngành có liên quan.
- Có tối thiểu 02 năm kinh nghiệm tại vị trí công việc liên quan, tham gia các dự án xây dựng, tích hợp giải pháp Công nghệ thông tin mảng Máy chủ Lưu trữ, Sao lưu dữ liệu, Máy chủ ảo hóa hoặc làm việc tại các công ty Tích hợp giải pháp hệ thống (System Integration – SI).
- Có kiến thức chuyên sâu về các công nghệ: SAN, NAS, Object Storage (S3), Cloud Storage, Data Retention, Data Tiering, Data Backup / Restore / Recovery, …
- Hiểu kiến trúc và luồng xử lý trong các hệ thống Storage/Backup.
- Thành thạo Linux (RedHat based/Debian based Linux…)
- Hiểu biết về các tiêu chuẩn và quy định bảo mật: ISO 27001, GDPR, PCI-DSS, … ứng dụng trong mảng Storage/Backup.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có một trong các chứng chỉ quốc tế từ các hãng như: Quantum, Dell, HPE, Veritas, Veeam, Commvault, AWS, NetApp, VMWare, … hoặc tương đương.
- Có khả năng làm việc độc lập cũng như kỹ năng teamwork trong các dự án
- Làm việc tại Hà Nội và công tác tại địa điểm của các đơn vị đối tác trong dự án khi có yêu cầu.
benefits:
- Làm việc theo thời gian linh hoạt, từ T2 - T6. (Có chế độ OT)
- Môi trường chuyên nghiệp, năng động, nhiều cơ hội phát triển.
- Được tài trợ thi chứng chỉ & Đào tạo chuyên sâu, dự án quy mô lớn.
- Môi trường làm việc kỹ thuật cao, làm việc với các chuyên gia từ các hãng công nghệ uy tín có mặt tại Việt Nam: Quantum, HPE, Dell, Veeam, Veritas, NetApp, VMWare, …
- Các chế độ phúc lợi khác (Khám sức khỏe định kỳ, Du lịch, …) tuân theo Luật lao động và Quy định của công ty.
- Xem xét đánh giá năng lực và mức đãi ngộ hàng năm.
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh (14-16 tháng lương/năm) thỏa thuận trong quá trình phỏng vấn theo kinh nghiệm và năng lực thực tế.

title: Senior Microsoft D365 F&O Developer (X++, .NET, ERP)
reasons:
- Attractive remuneration package with 18 days off
- Smart people, interesting project & swiss quality
- Travel opportunities to Switzerland
jobDescription:
As a Senior developer D365 Finance & Operations, you design, implement and maintain ERP solutions built with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations. You work closely with your local colleagues and collaborate with the Swiss team of functional and technical consultants who are in relationship with customers.

Your responsibilities

- Develop, customize, and extend D365 F&O solutions using X++, SQL DB, .NET, and other relevant technologies, following our development guidelines and in line with the current best practices.
- Customize and configure D365 F&O to meet specific business needs. This includes creating new modules, entities, forms, and reports, as well as modifying existing ones.
- Diagnose and resolve technical issues, working closely with functional consultants and if required with customers to ensure timely resolution of problems.
- Design and troubleshoot SQL DB data structures of D365 F&O.
- Source code and application lifecycle management with Azure DevOps and LCS tools: source code repositories, builds, pipelines and automation.
- Design and implement data integrations between D365 F&O and other enterprise systems, ensuring seamless data flow and consistency across the organization.
- Collaborate with functional consultants and business analysts to clarify business requirements or clarify technical specifications.
- Deploy the implemented solution. Perform system upgrades and apply patches as necessary.
requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
- At least 5 years of experience as a D365 F&O Developer.
- Proficiency in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations development tools, including X++.
- Mastery of SQL Server and database design.
- Strong know-how of D365 F&O modules structure.
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills.
- Ability to work independently and in a team-oriented environment.
- Knowledge of the Power Platform, .NET development and integration technologies.
- Knowledge of software testing automation/test automation tools for F&O is a plus
- Fluent in English – written and spoken
benefits:
- Professional European-based company
- Attractive salary
- Performance bonus of up to 4 months’ salary
- Opportunities to travel to Europe
- Hybrid home/ office working model
- Flexible working time
- Structured training & development roadmap
- Good work-life balance
- Premium healthcare insurance
- Loyalty programs
- Well-being activities
- Annual company trips and team-building events

title: Data Backup & Recovery Engineer (VMware & Windows)
company: CTCP SÀN GIAO DỊCH TÀI SẢN MÃ HÓA VIỆT NAM THỊNH VƯỢNG (CAEX)
reasons:
- Thưởng tháng 13
- Thưởng hiệu quả kinh doanh
- Bảo hiểm sức khoẻ cao cấp
jobDescription:
Job Purpose

Backup System Operator is responsible for maintaining the stability, availability, and security of backup infrastructure and related IT services. The role supports backup operations, monitoring, incident handling, backup strategy implementation, and data recovery activities to ensure committed SLAs and business continuity.

Key Responsibilities

- Operate, monitor, and maintain backup infrastructure and related IT services.
- Ensure backup system availability, stability, and recovery readiness in compliance with committed SLAs.
- Perform backup checks, troubleshooting, incident handling, and corrective actions.
- Deploy, maintain, upgrade, and optimize backup systems and related technologies.
- Implement backup strategies, data recovery processes, and security solutions.
- Manage backup configurations, system assets, operational procedures, and infrastructure standards.
- Monitor resource utilization, maintain capacity planning, and improve operational efficiency.
- Participate in change management, configuration management, and CAB activities.
- Coordinate with related teams and vendors to resolve incidents and improve service quality.
- Prepare operational checklists, reports, and technical documentation.
requirements:
- Degree in Computing or Information Science, or Postgraduate Diploma in Computer or Information Science.
- Minimum 3 years of experience in backup infrastructure operations or related system administration roles.
- Strong knowledge of enterprise infrastructure including Servers, Storage Area Networks (SAN), Network Attached Storage (NAS), Tape Libraries, De-duplication, Encryption, Compression, and Synchronization technologies.
- Hands-on experience working with operating platforms including Windows, RedHat, AIX, and VMware.
- Understanding of DC–DR infrastructure standards and backup architecture.
- Experience operating and administering backup and archiving systems using leading vendor solutions.
- Experience troubleshooting and resolving issues on backup systems during operation.
- Experience working with enterprise backup products and backup solutions.
- Strong understanding of backup strategies, data recovery, and infrastructure management.
- Good communication and technical reporting skills.
- Ability to work effectively within highly technical teams.
- Awareness of current industry trends and applicable technologies.

Nice to Have

- Experience with enterprise backup, archiving, and disaster recovery solutions.
- Experience designing or optimizing backup and recovery strategies.
- Relevant infrastructure or backup-related certifications.
benefits:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh
- Phụ cấp ăn trưa, điện thoại, gửi xe
- Thưởng tháng 13
- Thưởng hiệu quả kinh doanh
- Bảo hiểm sức khoẻ cao cấp
- BHXH/BHYT/BHTN nghỉ phép theo luật, du lịch/nội bộ hằng năm.

title: Product Manager (Civil/Mechanical background, CAD, BIM)
reasons:
- Competitive salary + Healthcare insurance package.
- Flexible Working Hours
- 13th month and productivity bonus.
jobDescription:
Job Description

Responsible for owning and controlling the direction of various components of the MiTek CAD software solutions. Works directly with various Product Managers on short and long-term planning on both existing and new CAD software solutions.

Responsible for writing operational requirements for CAD software solutions, including Design, Documentation and verification of features and functionality. Provides technical support, assistance, and training for support of new features and functionality. Works directly with customers to determine market needs, run customer research efforts, and to determine competitive environment needs. Is an active and critical member of an Agile Development scrum team within software development process and is a key part of the decision-making group to assess risk of various projects alongside project manager, software developers, QA managers, and other stakeholders such as the Product Portfolio Manager for CAD Solutions.

Role, Responsibilities & Typical Activities

- Set Direction: Help decide what features or tools should be built or improved in MiTek’s design software used in building construction.
- Work with Others: Team up with other product managers and departments to plan and align software improvements with business goals and customer needs.
- Write Clear Instructions: Describe how features should work in simple, structured documents so developers and testers know what to build and how to test it.
- Support Teams: Provide guidance and training to internal teams so they understand new features and can support customers better.
- Talk to Customers: Gather feedback and learn from users (internal and external) to ensure the software solves real problems and stays competitive.
- Represent the User: Make sure the customer's needs are always considered when making product decisions.
- Join the Team Workflow: Be an active part of development teams, helping plan and prioritize what should be worked on next.
- Help with Priorities: Work with technical leaders to manage risks and decide which tasks are most important.
- Coordinate Globally: Work with team members from around the world to make sure work is done on time and within budget.
- Manage the To-Do List: Keep a clear list of upcoming tasks and make trade-offs between short-term needs and long-term goals.
- Attend Evening Meetings: Join up to three evening meetings a week to coordinate with teams in the US and UK.
- Fix Issues: Help resolve product problems by working with technical teams to find and communicate solutions.
- Improve Processes: Follow and help improve the way the team works together.
- Stay Up to Date: Keep an eye on trends and rules in building design and construction to ensure the software stays relevant.
- Support Bigger Goals: Help with other team efforts when needed to support MiTek’s overall mission.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or a related technical discipline.
- Strong understanding of structural design concepts, particularly metal truss systems.
- Minimum of 3+ years of relevant work experience in engineering design, product development, or related technical roles.
- Familiarity with international building codes and standards, with a strong emphasis on North American codes (e.g., IBC, NBC...).
- Proven ability to translate technical requirements into product features and prioritize them based on business value.
- Excellent communication and coordination skills, with demonstrated ability to work effectively with cross-functional and global teams (engineering, design, QA, marketing, and business stakeholders).
- Must possess excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and the ability to communicate in both technical and business terms. (English level B2 - CEFR or equivalent)

Preferred Qualifications:

- Demonstrated leadership in driving product strategy, roadmap definition, and feature delivery for technical products.
- Understanding of SCRUM and Agile principles to collaborate effectively in a team environment.
benefits:
- Competitive salary with 13th‑month bonus, productivity bonus, and annual salary review
- Comprehensive healthcare package, including 24/24 personal accident insurance
- State‑of‑the‑art office environment (gym, shower, basketball & soccer field) with a high‑end laptop provided
- Work hand‑in‑hand with global software teams (Australia, New Zealand, UK, US, Canada…)
- Strong learning culture: paid self‑learning hours, LinkedIn Learning & Pluralsight access, in‑person classes with professional trainers (leadership, soft skills, English…), workshops, technical sharing activities...
- Clear career development with structured onboarding, ongoing training, and a mentorship program
- Flexible working: 5‑day work week and flexible start times
- Free lunch and free parking
- Team bonding through quarterly team‑building events, yearly company outing, and a special 3‑year anniversary trip
- Active social clubs: gym, yoga, football, badminton, swimming…

title: Application Support Level 2 (.Net, Angular)
jobDescription:
A- Positon Overview

The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring the smooth functioning of our software applications by providing timely support to our clients and resolving technical issues as efficiently as possible. They will work closely with Level 1 support to ensure timely resolution of tickets and will escalate complex issues to the Level 3 support team. The candidate should be adept at troubleshooting and have a strong understanding of various software development technologies. Ensure prompt and efficient resolution of technical issues related to the application throughout 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

B- Role and Responsibilities

- Provide support for projects released on production, ensuring their uninterrupted and smooth operation during 24/7. Work 40 hours/week (have 2 flexible days off a week).
- Handle Level 1 support tickets during 24/7, including diagnosing, troubleshooting, and resolving issues within agreed service level agreements (SLAs).
- Monitor the performance and functionality of the product/system running, ensuring any anomalies or issues are addressed promptly during 24/7. Includes:Data ETL pipelinesBackground jobs/servicesAPM, Loggingetc
- Data ETL pipelines
- Background jobs/services
- APM, Logging
- etc
- Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues within the scope of Level 2 support expertise, providing comprehensive solutions to clients and stakeholders during 24/7.
- Collaborate closely with the Level 3 support team to escalate complex technical issues that require further analysis and investigation.
- Maintain thorough documentation of support activities, including issue resolution processes, for future reference and knowledge sharing.
- Communicate effectively with clients, stakeholders, and cross-functional teams to provide timely updates on issue resolution and product performance, especially during 24/7.
- Proactively identify opportunities for process improvement and contribute to the enhancement of support services and system performance during 24/7.
requirements:
- Proven experience in providing application support at Level 2 in an IT software development environment.
- Strong understanding of software development lifecycle and methodologies.
- Proficiency in troubleshooting and resolving technical issues related to software applications and systems.
- Knowledge of the technology stack (e.g. .NET Core, Ionic, NodeJS, Angular) to support issue analysis.
- Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with attention to detail.
- Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities within tight deadlines.
- Experience in documenting support activities and processes for future reference.
- Knowledge of ITIL framework and best practices in IT service management is a plus
- Good English communication skills

title: AI Expert (Computer Vision/NLP/LLM)
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription: 2026TD450200 - AI ExpertChịu trách nhiệm định hướng, giám sát, điều phối và phát triển các dự án, sản phẩm hoặc dịch vụ AI trong ngân hàng.Nhiệm vụ chính:1. Tham gia xây dựng và triển khai định hướng cho các dự án AI2. Lập kế hoạch chi tiết và quản lý các dự án phát triển và ứng dụng AI.3. Giám sát và hỗ trợ đội ngũ phát triển trong việc phát triển và triển khai các giải pháp AI, đảm bảo chất lượng và hiệu suất cao nhất.4. Làm việc chặt chẽ với các phòng ban liên quan tại Trung tâm AI (LLM, NLP, Computer Vision, Chatbot, R&D.v.v. và các đơn vị khác) để đảm bảo sự phối hợp nhịp nhàng và tối ưu hóa nguồn lực.5. Cập nhật và nghiên cứu các công nghệ AI mới nhất, áp dụng vào các dự án thực tế.6. Đảm bảo chất lượng và hiệu suất cho các dự án AI, thực hiện kiểm tra và đánh giá định kỳ.7. Xác định và đánh giá các rủi ro trong quá trình triển khai dự án.8. Tham gia tuyển dụng nhân tài, huấn luyện và phát triển đội ngũ
requirements:
- Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực AI/ML.- Chuyên môn:+ Hiểu biết sâu về các công nghệ AI/ML/Computer Vision/NLP/LLM...+ Có chuyên môn sâu về quản trị dữ liệu- Kỹ năng quản lý:+ Kỹ năng lập kế hoạch, tổ chức và quản lý công việc+ Kỹ năng ra quyết định, giải quyết vấn đề và quản lý xung đột+ Khả năng truyền cảm hứng cho đội ngũ- Yêu cầu khác:+ Hiểu biết về các quy định pháp lý, đạo đức liên quan đến AI+ Kiến thức về quản trị rủi ro và các tiêu chuẩn ngành

MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau:- Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính- Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ- Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp- Kinh nghiệm làm việc- Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật- Nguồn Tuyển dụngVì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển?- Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng.- Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất.- Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn

Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage:- Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers
benefits:
Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện:

- Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể…
- Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm
- Khám sức khỏe định kì
- Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC)
- Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương

Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân:

- Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng
- Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng
- Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh.
- Hưởng các chính sách hỗ trợ, khuyến khích học tập, nâng cao trình độ và phát triển bản thân (chứng chỉ nghề quốc tế...)

Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với:

- Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng
- Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

title: Chuyên viên Vận hành và Phát triển hệ thống (Python)
company: Công ty cổ phần MAT Group
jobDescription:
1. Vận hành & Giám sát hệ thống

- Theo dõi hoạt động hàng ngày của hệ thống thu thập và xử lý dữ liệu đa nguồn; phát hiện và xử lý sự cố cơ bản.
- Đảm bảo dữ liệu được thu thập liên tục, đầy đủ; báo cáo bất thường cho tech lead.
- Bảo trì, cập nhật các script và công cụ vận hành hiện có theo hướng dẫn.
- Lập báo cáo định kỳ về tình trạng hệ thống và chất lượng dữ liệu.

2. Xây dựng workflow tự động hóa & ứng dụng AI

- Hỗ trợ xây dựng các luồng tự động hoá đơn giản phục vụ vận hành và xử lý dữ liệu nội bộ.
- Tích hợp API bên thứ ba vào hệ thống theo yêu cầu và hướng dẫn kỹ thuật có sẵn.
- Sử dụng các công cụ workflow automation (n8n, Make, hoặc tương đương) để triển khai các tác vụ lặp lại.
- Hỗ trợ xây dựng các kịch bản tương tác tự động cơ bản sử dụng LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, hoặc tương đương).
- Thực hiện prompt engineering; kiểm thử và đánh giá chất lượng output.
- Phối hợp với tech lead để cải tiến và mở rộng các kịch bản theo thực tế vận hành.
requirements:
Yêu cầu ứng viên

- Từ 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí tương đương
- Thành thạo Python ở mức thực dụng: đọc hiểu code, viết script xử lý dữ liệu, gọi API.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với Database (MySQL hoặc PostgreSQL)
- Biết làm việc trên môi trường Linux, quen với git cơ bản.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật và làm theo hướng dẫn một cách chính xác.

Ưu tiên:

- Đã từng dùng LLM API hoặc các công cụ AI tạo sinh ở mức cá nhân/thực nghiệm.
- Có kinh nghiệm với công cụ automation như n8n, Make, Zapier hoặc tự build các công cụ automation riêng.
- Biết Node.js hoặc một ngôn ngữ backend khác là lợi thế.
- Có hiểu biết cơ bản về NLP/ text processing
benefits:
- Mức lương thỏa thuận theo năng lực.
- Tham gia đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định
- Chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện với gói Bảo hiểm sức khỏe và chương trình khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm
- Thưởng Lễ, Tết theo hiệu quả công việc
- Môi trường Agency trẻ trung, năng động, cởi mở, thỏa sức sáng tạo với khách hàng là các thương hiệu lớn hàng đầu tại Việt Nam.
- Có nhiều cơ hội phát triển nghề nghiệp, thể hiện năng lực bản thân.
- Được tham gia các lớp đào tạo nâng cao kiến thức, kỹ năng, nghiệp vụ.
- Team Building, du lịch hàng năm.

companyInfo.name: Công ty cổ phần MAT Group

title: Network & System Administrator
reasons:
- Competitive salary, bonus, review salary/year
- Participate in full government-regulated insurance
- A professional working environment
jobDescription:
1. Network System Management and Operations:

- Monitor, configure, operate, and troubleshoot LAN/WAN network systems, firewalls, routers, switches, and VPNs.
- Track and optimize network performance to ensure high availability, stability, and security, and resolve issues related to connectivity, speed, or security.

2. System & Storage Administration:

- Manage virtualization systems (VMware), physical server infrastructure, and high-speed storage arrays (SAN/NAS) supporting Oracle databases.

3. Support and Reporting:

- Provide technical support to internal users for network and server-related issues.
- Prepare periodic reports on system status, risks, and incidents for management.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Security, Computer Networking, or related fields.
- Minimum 2 years of experience in network/system administration or cybersecurity.
- Solid understanding of network architecture and protocols (TCP/IP, LAN/WAN, VLAN, DNS, DHCP, VPN).
- Basic knowledge of network security (Firewalls, IDS/IPS).
- Experience with Windows Server, Linux, and network monitoring tools (e.g., Wireshark, Nagios, SolarWinds).
- Familiarity with virtualization (VMware) and Hybrid Cloud (AWS/Azure) is a plus.
- Ability to write basic automation scripts (Python, Bash, or PowerShell) is an advantage.
- English: Intermediate.
benefits:
- Competitive salary based on capabilities.Salary review 1–2 times per year.
- Lunch allowance, parking allowance, phone allowance, and other types of allowances, depending on job position.
- Annual health check-ups, 24/24 accident insurance (health insurance), and social insurance with 100% of the salary package. Private health insurance is provided by PJICO.
- Opportunities to participate in professional and career skill training programs organized by the company.
- Financial support for attending external training programs.
- Participation in sports, entertainment, and travel activities such as team connection events, birthday celebrations, team-building, holiday gifts, etc., to promote health and strengthen employee engagement.
- KPI bonus based on work results.
- Leave policy:12 days/year for staff-level positions.15 days/year for managerial positions.

title: Senior React Native Developer
reasons:
- Attractive salary
- Fun, flexible and challenging work
- A purpose: improve the life of thousands of women
jobDescription:
Our Mission

⭐️ Perifit is a profitable and fast-growing Femtech startup based in Paris, France, with a software team based in Ho Chi Minh City. Turnover was multiplied by 100 in 5 years!

Our goal is to assist women worldwide with the most challenging moments in their lives – moments that are heavily under-addressed – and provide fun and effective self-care solutions.

Our first product, the Perifit (a connected probe and its mobile games), launched in 2018, has become the #1 connected solution for pelvic floor rehabilitation. As of now, it has helped more than 500,000 women and is the best-ranked app in its category.

We now develop innovative pelvic floor trainers and breast pumps that use the most recent technologies to help women improve their lives. Our mission is to empower women to take control of their health and improve their overall well-being.

At Perifit, we stand for equality, inclusivity, benevolence, and wellbeing for both our clients and our employees.

Joining Perifit means being part of a dynamic, mission-driven team that is making a real difference in women's lives, and having the opportunity to contribute to a growing and innovative startup in the Femtech industry!

We're very proud of our values! FREEDOM – FEMINISM – STARTUP MINDSET – REAL IMPACT – NO EGO
requirements:
- React Native Mastery: 5+ years building and shipping production React Native apps at scale, including 2+ years owning the architecture of a complex production app.
- Backend & Database: Proven, hands-on experience with Firestore and SQL/MySQL databases.
- Algorithms & Signal Processing: Solid understanding of applied mathematics, real-time data processing, and algorithm design.
- Mobile Deployment: Ownership of the full app release process on the App Store and Google Play, including CI/CD.
- English Proficiency: Excellent written and spoken English for technical reporting and cross-team collaboration.
- AI-driven Development (nice to have): Experience leveraging AI-assisted development tools and workflows (e.g. coding agents, review AI works and test what AI done, etc.) to ship faster with high quality.
benefits:
You'll be building applications that directly impact the lives of hundreds of thousands of women – and their families. Your role is deeply hands-on, giving you both technical depth and real ownership of the apps.

- 🏥 Insurance benefits provided through PTI
- 🏢 Flexible and Friendly Work Environment: Dynamic startup culture, international team, and a focus on wellbeing.
- Annual bonus up to 20% of total annual salary (includes 13th-month salary and performance bonus)
- Company bonus based on the company's performance

title: Applied AI Research Engineer (Agentic Systems)
company: CÔNG TY TNHH NANYANG BIOLOGICS VIỆT NAM
jobDescription:
Most agentic AI work optimizes against benchmarks that don't push back. Here, the agent's hypotheses get tested at the bench — its reasoning is answerable to real experimental results, not a leaderboard. We have a working system orchestrating 300+ tools; what we need is someone to keep it at the frontier. You'll read the latest in agentic research, decide what's real, and ship it into a system where "better" means a better experiment runs next week. If you want your work on autonomous agents to be grounded in reality instead of demos, this is the rare seat where it is.

Roles and Responsibilities

- Own the research-to-production loop for our agent: survey emerging agentic techniques, run structured experiments against them, and ship what proves out.
- Continuously upgrade core agent capabilities — planning, tool selection and reasoning, memory, multi-agent coordination — measured against real benchmarks, not demos.
- Build and own the evaluation harness that tells us whether a change is actually an improvement. This is the backbone of the role.
- Diagnose where the agent fails at the frontier of its current capability and design the fixes.
- Set technical direction for agentic best practices internally; review, mentor, and raise the quality bar for the existing engineers.
- Translate latest research into pragmatic engineering decisions under real reliability and cost constraints
requirements:
Required

- 6+ years software/ML engineering, with a recent track record building production agentic systems (planning, tool use, multi-step reasoning) — not prompt pipelines.
- Education: Master’s or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, or a highly quantitative field with a strong focus on autonomous systems or NLP.
- Demonstrated ability to take a technique from current research and land it in a production system, with measured impact.
- Strong command of agent frameworks and patterns (e.g., LangGraph, MCP, or equivalents) and the internals: tool definition, state/context management, orchestration.
- Rigorous evaluation — you've designed eval harnesses for non-deterministic systems and trust data over intuition.
- Fluent in reading and dismantling ML/agent papers; strong Python and system-design fundamentals.

Preferred

- Exposure to scientific or research workflows, ideally drug discovery or other iterative experimental loops.
- Experience mentoring or setting technical direction for a small team.
- Background in RAG, memory systems, or multi-agent orchestration; bio/chem familiarity a plus.
benefits:
We provide a dynamic, fast-paced, and collaborative environment where problem-solving and agility are at the heart of what we do. Along with a competitive salary, we foster a culture that values ambition, confidence, and humility, consistently pushing the boundaries of innovation. If you're excited about working in a young, talented tech company and want to explore the world of AI and pharmaceuticals, we encourage you to apply.

- Competitive salary
- Lunch provided, free snack, fruits, ….
- Workplace: 45-47 Tran Xuan Soan, Hai Ba Trung, Ha Noi (Mon - Fri: 9h -17h)
- Build a professional network through collaborations with pharmaceutical companies, industry leaders, and academic experts.
- Work on impactful projects that address critical challenges in drug discovery and healthcare.

title: Java Developer Intern (6 months)
reasons:
- Creativity, innovation and challenging
- Flexible working hours and work-life balance
- Very competitive salary with 100% during probation
jobDescription:
We are looking for a Java Developer Intern to join our team in Hanoi, Vietnam. You will work on real projects developing RESTful APIs and microservices and gain experience with containerized applications and message queue systems.

As a Java Developer Intern, your key responsibilities will include:

- Develop and maintain RESTful APIs with Java
- Implement microservice architecture
- Write clean, secure, and scalable code
- Collaborate with the engineering team
- Learn containerization and stream processing technologies
requirements:
What makes you our ideal candidate?

- Familiar with Java programming language
- Familiar with using AI tools at work (ChatGPT, Windsurf or others)
- Good foundation in relational databases, OOP and DSA

title: Data Engineer (Ops)
reasons:
- User-first mindset, solving real needs with impact
- Data-driven culture, decisions backed by insights
- Safe space to innovate, fail fast and grow faster
jobDescription:
About GHN

Giao Hang Nhanh (GHN) is one of Vietnam's leading logistics enterprises, confidently providing superior services: "SMARTER, FASTER, MORE COST-EFFECTIVE." We support millions of businesses in optimizing their operations and create thousands of jobs for the Vietnamese people.

Established with the mission to revolutionize the logistics industry and driven by a technology-centric development approach, GHN continuously applies advanced technological solutions to every order. This aims to streamline operational processes, enhance delivery efficiency, and provide fast, secure, and effective service experiences for all customer segments – from e-commerce platforms and retailers to individual consumers.

With a nationwide network covering all 34 provinces and a strategy of continuous innovation alongside a robust infrastructure system, GHN has been affirming its pioneering position in the rapidly growing e-commerce and logistics sectors in Vietnam.

Why Join GHN?

This is a pivotal opportunity to join a rapidly growing e-commerce delivery leader in Vietnam, where your contributions will directly impact our strategic direction and market position. You will be part of a team that embraces cutting-edge technologies, data- driven innovation & discruption to solve real-world problems and enhance millions of lives. We offer a dynamic and collaborative environment where you can leverage your expertise, grow professionally through challenging projects, and make a significant impact on our success.

About the AI & Data Team

At GHN, our highly motivated AI & Data team is dedicated to establishing GHN as the fastest, most reliable, and convenient delivery service in Vietnam. We achieve this by developing and adopting advanced, data-driven decisions and solutions, making data capability a core business driver for operational efficiency, scalability, and customer trust and happiness.

Job Summary

We are seeking an exceptionally skilled and experienced Senior DataOps Engineer to manage, automate, and scale our high-performance, open-source-focused data platform. This role is central to our data strategy, requiring a blend of DevOps principles, deep infrastructure expertise, and data engineering fundamentals. The ideal candidate will ensure the reliability, security, and efficiency of our end-to-end data lifecycle, from ingestion and streaming to computation and visualization.

Key Responsibilities

- Platform Design & Automation: Architect, deploy, and maintain scalable, robust, and secure data infrastructure on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE). Focus on automation using advanced scripting (Python, Go, Shell) and Kubernetes-native tools (e.g., manifests) across development, staging, and production environments.
- Orchestration & Data Flow: Design, implement, and optimize complex data pipelines using Apache Airflow. Ensure reliable data movement and scheduling for batch and streaming workloads.
- Streaming & Real-Time Data: Oversee and manage our diverse streaming ecosystem, including Kafka and RabbitMQ. Implement and administer Change Data Capture (CDC) processes using Kafka Connect with providers like Debezium, Confluent, and Lenseio.
- Data Governance & Security: Enforce data access control and audit policies using Apache Ranger across compute layers. Implement security best practices using Google Secret Manager and KMS for sensitive data and credentials.
- CI/CD & Deployment: Own and enhance the continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) pipeline for data services using GitLab and ArgoCD, ensuring fast, reliable, and consistent environment rollouts.
- Performance & Optimization: Tune and optimize compute engines (Trino, Spark, Doris) and query performance on BigQuery. Manage storage layer efficiencies on GCS.
- Monitoring & Observability: Establish and maintain comprehensive monitoring, logging, and alerting using tools like Grafana to ensure high availability and proactive issue resolution.
- Metadata & Cataloging: Maintain and leverage metadata management systems (Hive Metastore, DataHub) to ensure data discoverability and quality across the organization.
requirements:
Our Comprehensive Data Platform Stack

Candidates should have demonstrable, deep experience across the majority of the following technologies:

- Compute & Query: Trino (or Presto), Apache Spark, Google BigQuery, Apache Doris
- Streaming & Messaging: Apache Flink, Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ
- CDC & Connectors: Kafka Connect (e.g., Debezium, Confluent)
- Infrastructure & Orchestration: Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), Apache Airflow
- Databases: MongoDB, AlloyDB, MySQL, Redis
- Policy & Security: Apache Ranger, Google Secret Manager, KMS
- CI/CD & Tooling: GitLab, ArgoCD
- Languages: Python (Mandatory for DataOps), Java, Scala, Go
- Storage & Metadata: GCS, Hive Metastore, DataHub
- Table Format: Apache Iceberg
- Observability: Grafana, Superset, Metabase, Looker

Qualifications

- Experience: 3+ years in a DevOps or DataOps role focused on building and managing large-scale, distributed data platforms.
- Cloud Native: Deep expertise in cloud-native architecture, particularly on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
- Automation & Scripting: Proficiency in Python and Shell scripting is mandatory. Experience with Go or Java/Scala for supporting data services is a strong asset.
- Containers & Orchestration: Advanced hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes (GKE), including writing custom operators or complex deployment manifests.
- Operational Excellence: Proven track record of designing, implementing, and maintaining high-SLA systems, with a strong focus on security, observability, and disaster recovery.
- Communication: Excellent communication skills, capable of explaining complex technical issues to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Education:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, Information Systems, or a related quantitative technical field.
- Master's degree in a related technical field is highly preferred.
benefits:
- 13th-month salary, performance bonuses, and KPI bonuses
- Health insurance, Social insurance, and Unemployment insurance
- Medical insurance
- Annual health checkup
- Annual salary reviews
- Annual team building/company trip
- Ongoing internal and external training opportunities.

jobDescription:
- Translate ambiguous business problems into well-defined ML/DS problems. Investigate the real issue before proposing a solution, scope the right approach, and know when ML is the wrong answer.
- Set technical direction for ML initiatives in your problem area. Make build-vs-buy, ML-vs-heuristic, and model-architecture decisions based on cost, latency, complexity, and business impact — not novelty.
- Own ML systems end-to-end in production: data ingestion, training, serving, monitoring, retraining, and rollback. Anticipate and design around failure modes — data drift, train/serve skew, feedback loops, cold start, and label leakage — before they hit users.
- Build and ship the services, APIs, and integrations around your models, working across the stack to deliver ML-powered features users actually touch.
- Define the metrics that matter — offline evaluation, online A/B tests, and long-term business KPIs — and defend them. Question metrics you're handed when they don't reflect real user or business value.
- Partner with product, design, and business stakeholders to shape the roadmap, not just execute it. Translate model behavior and data insights into narratives that drive decisions at both tactical and executive levels.
- Raise the technical bar of the team through design reviews, code reviews, and mentorship. Your output is measured by what you ship and by what you unblock and elevate in others.
requirements:
- Total 5+ years of experience designing, building, and operating production — ideally in e-commerce or marketplace domains (recommendation, search, ranking, pricing, segmentation, or trust & safety).
- At least 2 YOE working as ML/AI engineer role
- Fluent use of AI coding assistants and LLM-based tools in your daily workflow (Claude Code, Copilot, or equivalent). At Chotot, AI is a compulsory tool in product development.
- Hands-on experience owning ML systems end-to-end in production environments
- Excellent English communication — you will work directly with cross-country teams
- Experience building and scaling ML-powered products from early-stage development to large-scale production usage, with strong ownership across product iteration, system reliability, and business impact.
- Track record of ML systems you personally took from problem framing to production and measurable business impact — not just trained models, but shipped features users interacted with.
- Experience Python and SQL, with hands-on experience in a cloud data warehouse (BigQuery preferred) and a public cloud (GCP preferred).
- Solid grasp of both classical ML and deep learning. You pick the right tool for the constraint rather than defaulting to the latest paper.

- Deep Systems Thinking: Excellent problem-solving skills with a profound understanding of systems across all layers. Proficiency in OOP, Design Patterns, algorithms, and data structures.
- Tech Expert: Expert in one or more programming languages (Java, Go, C/C++/C#, TypeScript, Python...) and deep knowledge of modern frameworks (NestJS, Django, Spring, .NET Core, React...).
- Ecosystem Mastery: Experience with distributed storage and messaging systems (RabbitMQ, Kafka...), Microservices architecture, and ETL processes. Strong foundation in both SQL and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, Oracle, MongoDB...).
- Cloud-Native Mastery: Experience defining architectures for cloud-deployed applications (AWS preferred) and containerized environments (Docker, Kubernetes).
- Fluent Communication: Fluent English communication is mandatory, empowering you to confidently collaborate, negotiate, and design solutions with global partners.
- Bonus: Good understanding of Blockchain platforms, Smart Contracts, and P2P networks.

THE SHERPA MINDSET

- Business Outcome-Driven: You don't focus on "closing tickets"; you focus on helping clients freely operate and dominate their market. You define the "Peak" before building the "Tools".
- Calmness & Team Spirit: Maintain unwavering stability when facing technical storms, acting as an inspiring pillar of support for the entire team.
- Authenticity & Passion for Exploration: Ready to embrace differences, tackle technical barriers head-on, and constantly crave exploring new technologies.
- Value-Driven AI Prototyping: The ability to bypass the hype and immediately identify business pain points where AI can provide actual ROI, defining the "Summit" before picking the AI "Gear".
- Productivity Optimization: Fluent in leveraging AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code,...) to accelerate the high-velocity engineering of the development team , actively mentoring tech leads on how to leverage AI safely to double code velocity without sacrificing software quality.
benefits:
Rewarding Your "Sherpa" Spirit

- Competitive salary (100% paid during probation) honoring your expertise.
- 13th month bonus for all, plus a 14th month "Summit" bonus for exceptional performance.
- Paid overtime (150-350%) – we value every extra mile you go.

Ensuring Your "Peace of Mind"

- Comprehensive health insurance to keep you ready for the climb.
- 14+ annual leave days (increasing with seniority) to recharge.
- Hybrid & Flexible: Monday to Friday work policy with remote options – meaningful work requires a balanced life.

Life at "Base Camp" (Office Life)

- Free snacks, drinks, and parking – fueling your daily journey.
- A friendly relaxation space to connect with fellow "Pathfinders."
- Fun get-togethers, sports clubs, and our legendary Annual Company Trip.

Empowering You to Lead & Build

- Cross-Pillar Growth: Opportunities to rotate and learn across Studio (Eng), Insights (Consulting), and Labs (R&D).
- Professional training allowance & mentorship from seasoned industry veterans.
- Workshops, language classes, and international career opportunities (Europe & America).

Impact Beyond Code

- Innovation: Join Dirox Labs projects with real social impact (moving from "Need" to "Desire").
- Community: Charity events, aid, and scholarship sponsorships.
- Culture: A human-sized company where you are a name, not a number.

title: Senior/Lead Data Engineer (AWS/Databricks)
reasons:

jobDescription:
Role Summary

Itviec’s client is seeking a Lead Platform Engineer who will take ownership of the design, implementation, and operation of our core data, analytics, and ML infrastructure. This role spans across platform architecture, DevSecOps, DataOps, and ML infrastructure, and requires a combination of strategic thought leadership and hands-on execution. You will build, integrate, and operate platforms on AWS and Databricks, enabling scalable, secure, production-grade ML/AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities

- Architect and implement end-to-end data and ML platforms: data lakes, warehouses, streaming and batch pipelines, model training/deployment infrastructure, on AWS + Databricks.
- Lead DevSecOps and DataOps practices: infrastructure as code (IaC), CI/CD pipelines for data & ML workflows, secure multi-account/multi-region cloud operations.
- Integrate AWS services (e.g., S3, Redshift, Kinesis, Lambda, EKS/ECS) with Databricks runtime, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog etc to build scalable, performant pipelines.
- Build and operate ML infrastructure: training clusters, model versioning, MLOps toolchain (e.g., MLflow), model monitoring and observability, automatic retraining workflows.
- Establish data governance, lineage, quality, observability standards across data pipelines and ML workflows.
- Mentor engineering teams, define architectural best practices and guide implementation of high-scale data/ML systems.
- Optimize system performance, cost and scalability; diagnose and resolve large-scale production issues.
- Continuously evaluate new tools and technologies in the areas of cloud, data platform, DevSecOps, ML infrastructure and apply them to drive innovation.
requirements:
- 7+ years of experience in data platform architecture, cloud/ML infrastructure engineering or related roles.
- Deep technical expertise in Databricks and AWS: demonstrated ability to design, integrate and operate solutions spanning both platforms.
- Strong hands-on implementation skills: you will not just design but build, deploy and operate the platform.
- Proven track record of building and operating scalable ML/AI platforms in production (model training & deployment).
- Expertise in Apache Spark, Delta Lake, modern data pipeline frameworks (batch + streaming).
- Strong background in infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation), CI/CD for data/ML, and DevSecOps practices.
- Proficiency in Python and SQL; familiarity with Scala or equivalent is a plus.
- Experience with data governance, data lineage, observability and MLOps frameworks (e.g., MLflow, Airflow, dbt).
- Bonus: Experience in fintech, regulated industries or high-security environments.
benefits:
About our client

Our client is a fast-scaling Fintech platform enabling seamless banking solutions across emerging markets. They blend innovation with scalable tech infrastructure to help millions access secure, intuitive financial services. Operating in a highly dynamic international environment, the company offers a sustainable professional space with a clear focus on technological excellence, agile culture, and continuous human development.

Why You’ll Love Working Here

- Financial Package: 13th-month salary pro-rata, attractive performance bonuses of up to 2 months, 100% salary during probation, and fully covered meal and parking allowances.
- Work-Life Balance: Strictly 40-hour workweek (Monday to Friday) in a Hybrid setup, plus a generous leave package of 20 days

- Career Growth: Clear career acceleration through SMART goals, supported by technical seminars, conferences, career talks, and exclusive overseas travel opportunities for training and work.
- Engagement: A vibrant, values-driven international culture featuring internal Hackathons, dynamic company events (team building, coffee runs, blue card), and a highly agile working environment.
