jobDescription:
Company Description

The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services. Since the beginning of 2013, its operations have been divided into four business sectors: Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology.

The Bosch Group comprises Robert Bosch GmbH and its roughly 360 subsidiaries and regional companies in some 50 countries. If its sales and service partners are included, then Bosch is represented in roughly 150 countries. This worldwide development, manufacturing, and sales network is the foundation for further growth.

Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited (BGSV) is 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH - one of the world’s leading global suppliers of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT, and Business Solutions.

Starting its operation from 2010 at Etown 2 in HCMC, BGSV is the first software development center of Bosch in Southeast Asia. BGSV nowadays have over 4,000 associates, with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region.

With our unique ability to offer end-to-end solutions that connect sensors, software, and services, we enable businesses to move from the traditional to digital or improve businesses by introducing a digital element in their products and processes.

Job Description

A Lead Front-End Developer for a global IT workflow product drives the user experience of complex, data-heavy systems. This role requires balancing hands-on technical excellence with the architectural foresight needed to scale products across international markets.

You will lead the front-end strategy for a global IT workflow automation product, guiding architecture and delivery of intuitive, performant experiences for complex, data-heavy use cases. From drag-and-drop workflow builders and real-time dashboards to configuration wizards, you’ll set the technical direction, raise engineering standards, and ensure the UI is responsive, accessible, and reliable across regions and network conditions.

Key Responsibilities

· Technical strategy and architecture: Define the front-end architecture (React + TypeScript primary) including state management patterns, choosing frameworks and patterns that ensure scalability and maintainability. Drive API contract discipline with backend and define caching/streaming strategies for real-time data.

· Design System Management: Own and scale the Bosch Digital Design System and component library, ensuring pixel-perfect consistency across all regions and product modules. You will ensure Bosch Corporate Design is applied correctly.

· Workflow Automation UX: Design and implement intuitive interfaces for complex logic, such as drag-and-drop workflow builders, real-time data dashboards, and integration of wizards.

· Design system leadership: Own and evolve the component library and design tokens (theming, dark/HC modes); govern adoption via Storybook, documentation, and CI gates (lint, a11y, visual regression). Ensure consistency and scalability across modules and international variants.

· Global readiness (i18n, a11y, performance): Ensure high performance across varying network conditions and localized support for multiple languages and regional data standards.

· Engineering excellence and security: Build a testing strategy and implement CI/CD quality gates, bundle analysis, and static checks.

· Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with UX/UI designers to bridge the gap between high-fidelity designs and technical feasibility, and with backend teams to define robust API contracts.

· Team Mentorship: Mentor engineers, lead code reviews, establish engineering standards and playbooks, and contribute to hiring and onboarding.
requirements:
Must Have

- Education: Bachelor’s or master's degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field.
- Experience: 7+ years of professional front-end experience, including 3+ years leading teams or major initiatives on large-scale web apps.
- Core Languages: Expert in modern JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 (Sass/CSS Modules) and modern layout.
- Frameworks: Extensive experience with React, Angular, or Vue.js, including state management (e.g., Redux, MobX). React proficiency building reusable, stateful components and hooks; strong command of state management.
- Design system adoption across 2+ product modules with documented components and usage guidelines.
- Build & Deployment: Proficiency with Git-based workflows, and CI/CD (GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/Jenkins) with quality gates.
- Testing: Strong background in automated testing frameworks like Jest, Cypress, or Playwright.
- Deep understanding of Web Accessibility (WCAG) and SEO best practices.
- Localized experiences delivered in multiple languages, including at least one RTL locale.
- Security awareness (OWASP front-end risks, XSS/CSP, secure handling of untrusted content).
- Agile Mindset: Proven track record of delivering in fast-paced, sprint-based global environments.
- Global Mindset: Experience delivering software that accounts for regional cultural nuances and varied internet speeds.

Nice to Have

- Workflow Expertise: Experience building tools for IT operations, project management, or SaaS automation is highly desirable.
- Project Management: Ability to manage timelines, define technical roadmaps, and communicate progress to senior stakeholders.
- Design token pipelines (Style Dictionary), Storybook, Chromatic/visual regression testing.
- Observability (Sentry, Datadog), feature flagging, A/B testing.
- Experience with distributed teams and varying network conditions across regions.
- Measurable improvements in Core Web Vitals and interaction latency on at least one high-traffic workflow.
benefits:
- Private Health Insurance (Generali) : Covered by company
- Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company
- 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract)
- 12 days annual leave

title: Tech Architecture & Solutions
reasons:
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh trên thị trường
- Làm việc với các dự án trọng điểm

jobDescription:
1. Architecture Strategy & Governance

- Build, maintain, and continuously improve the bank-wide application architecture framework and standards.
- Define architecture principles, target-state roadmaps, and modernization strategies aligned with business goals.
- Drive transformation from legacy/traditional applications to cloud-native, microservices, containerized, or serverless architectures.
- Participate in Architecture Review Boards and key governance forums.
- Ensure all solutions comply with architecture blueprints, security standards, development methodology, and regulatory requirements.
- Manage architecture changes to ensure consistency, integrity, and standardization across systems.

2. Solution Design & Project Delivery

- Own end-to-end technical solution design for banking applications, digital platforms, and enterprise systems.
- Analyze business, functional, technical, and data requirements to design optimal architecture solutions.
- Produce architecture artifacts including HLD, LLD, deployment models, data flows, integration diagrams, and technical specifications.
- Work closely with Business Units, PM, BA, DEV, QE, Enterprise Architects, and Infrastructure teams to deliver effective solutions.
- Evaluate solution options, conduct technical scoring, and recommend suitable technologies/vendors.
- Coordinate development, testing, implementation, and documentation throughout project lifecycle.
- Ensure adherence to SDLC, software engineering best practices, and architecture intent during delivery.

3. Integration Architecture & Ecosystem Connectivity

- Design integration architecture across key banking platforms such as Core Banking, CRM, Digital Channels, Data Platforms, LOS, BPM, and other enterprise systems.
- Define and govern integration patterns using APIs, ESB, middleware, messaging, and event-driven architecture.
- Recommend solutions using API Gateway, Kafka, RabbitMQ, streaming platforms, and service mesh where appropriate.
- Support Open API / Open Banking initiatives and secure integration with partners, fintechs, and external ecosystems.

4. Cloud Transformation & Application Modernization

- Define migration roadmaps to cloud using Rehost, Replatform, Refactor, or Replace approaches.
- Design solutions for on-premise, hybrid cloud, and public cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP).
- Promote containerization using Docker / Kubernetes and platform engineering best practices.
- Drive DevSecOps, CI/CD automation, Infrastructure as Code, and GitOps adoption.
- Optimize architecture for cost efficiency, operational simplicity, and faster time-to-market.

5. Non-Functional Requirements & Operational Excellence

- Ensure solutions meet non-functional requirements including scalability, availability, resilience, observability, maintainability, and performance.
- Design strategies for caching, load balancing, HA, DR, autoscaling, monitoring, logging, tracing, and alerting.
- Ensure strong security controls covering IAM, authentication, authorization, encryption, audit logging, and compliance.
- Identify architecture risks, technical debt, bottlenecks, and propose mitigation plans.

6. Technology Leadership & Capability Development

- Research emerging technology trends and assess practical adoption opportunities for the bank.
- Contribute to development of enterprise standards, reusable patterns, and architecture playbooks.
- Coach and mentor engineering teams on modern architecture, cloud technologies, and agile delivery models.
- Act as a senior architecture advisor to management and project stakeholders.
- Support strategic initiatives and perform other responsibilities assigned by management.
requirements:
Education

- Bachelor’s degree or above in Information Technology, Computer Science, Electronics & Telecommunications,
- Mathematics, or related disciplines.
- Strong academic background from reputable universities is preferred.
- Relevant certifications such as TOGAF, AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, PMP, Agile are advantageous.

Experience

- Minimum 6–10 years of experience in software engineering, system integration, or enterprise technology roles.
- Minimum 5 years in Solution Architect / Application Architect / equivalent architecture role.
- Proven track record delivering complex enterprise or banking transformation programs end-to-end.
- Strong experience in banking or financial services environment is highly preferred.

Technical Skills

- Deep understanding of software architecture patterns: Monolith, Microservices, Event-Driven, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), SOA.
- Strong knowledge of cloud computing, hybrid architecture, and modern infrastructure platforms.
- Hands-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, DevSecOps, IaC, GitOps.
- Strong integration expertise: REST API, gRPC, ESB, Messaging, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Event Streaming.
- Good knowledge of databases: SQL, NoSQL, distributed caching, schema design.
- Strong understanding of security architecture: IAM, OAuth2, SSO, encryption, audit, logging.
- Experience designing for high transaction volume, high availability, scalability, and DR.
- Strong documentation and presentation skills.

Soft Skills

- Strategic thinking with strong business and technology perspective.
- Strong communication skills with ability to explain complex technical concepts clearly.
- Practical problem-solving mindset with ability to identify risks and propose solutions proactively.
- Strong stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration skills.
- Detail-oriented, decisive, accountable, and results-driven.
- Able to work independently and lead technical decisions under pressure.

Language

- Good command of English (written and verbal).

jobDescription:
We are a talented team of specialized professionals working to design and develop modern software products for our international range of clients. We work with global clients, ranging from startups to Fortune 500 companies.

We follow agile processes, and modern design-thinking practices, promote direct client collaboration, and focus on cutting-edge technologies. We have expertise in web development, mobile development, machine learning, and data engineering.

As a Technical Lead, you will work closely with the co-founders and the senior team to further make CodeLink an awesome environment for 80+ employees and all of the people we work with.

What You’ll Do

Technical Delivery & Architecture

- Lead end-to-end design and development of scalable, secure, and high-performance systems.
- Provide architectural direction and make key technical decisions to ensure quality and maintainability.
- Oversee the full software development lifecycle, guiding engineers across all stages.
- Define and enforce engineering best practices (code review, unit testing, CI/CD, pair programming).
- Drive DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
- Ensure systems meet high standards for reliability, scalability, and security, especially in regulated domains.

Stakeholder Communication & Collaboration

- Act as the main technical representative for stakeholders, ensuring alignment between business and technical solutions.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Design, Delivery) to ensure smooth execution.
- Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships through transparency and consistent delivery.

Team Growth & Development

- Partner with Talent teams to support hiring, onboarding, and team scaling.
- Participate in interviews and technical assessments to maintain high hiring standards.
- Coach and mentor engineers, supporting their growth to senior and leadership levels.
- Foster a strong engineering culture through knowledge sharing and continuous learning initiatives.

- Experience in secure systems, coding practices & related tools.
- Experience in pre-sales client prospecting is a plus.
benefits:
Who We Are

CodeLink is an innovative and design-focused development agency. We focus on user-centric design and agile development to bring the product vision of our clients to life. We handle the end-to-end development of products, developing the product vision through product understanding, designing experiences through UX design, refining these flows with modern UI design, and developing products through iterative agile development.

We work with both early-stage product teams and teams with existing products from a wide range of countries and industries. We focus on modern technologies and work directly with our clients. We design using design-thinking principles on tools such as Sketch, Figma, Zeplin, and more, and develop products leveraging our tech stack of React, React Native, Rails, Python, and Node.JS.

Our Core Values

1. Take full ownership of deliveryWe take ownership of our client projects and ensure that we deliver what we are in charge of to the best possible outcome.

2. Deliver our highest level of qualityWe take pride in the high quality that we deliver and work at a sustainable pace to ensure we can always deliver on that quality.

3. Stay consistent in plans and processesWe keep open and transparent communication with our teammates and our client whilst following agile development practices.

4. Have empathy for all those we work withWe show empathy and respect to all those we work with to gain a deeper understanding without any judgment or assumption.

5. Continuously improve and growWe aim high with a growth mindset and see every day as an opportunity to develop ourselves, our processes, and our products.

Top 3 Reasons To Join Us

- Use cutting-edge & proven technologies
- Work directly with international clients
- Open environment with a focus on learning

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We work hand-in-hand with our clients to fully invest in their product development and build solutions together for their target market.

- We fully invest in our team, we will help you build yourself up in any area you feel you need development, be it in English, learning a new design tool, developing your design thinking, and more. We want to make sure that you’re always learning and developing yourself whilst a part of our team.
- We respect both Product and Technology equally, ensuring all of the Products we work on have features with true market potential and ensuring all of the team contribute to, understand, and believe in what they are developing.
- We are very selective with our clients, we only work on awesome products we believe in and that show strong market potential.
- We respect you and your personal hours, we keep a sustainable pace by working standard 8 hour days from Monday to Friday, ensuring we only plan for what we can achieve.
- We are fully agile and only work with Clients who work the same, working with set sprint goals and working at our rate of velocity.
- You will have ownership over your role, giving you the opportunity to experiment and try new processes to better improve your day-to-day responsibilities. We are always open to improving our processes.

Company Benefits

- An open and dynamic working environment with no dress code and the freedom to be yourself.
- Modern open-space office with comfortable workspace, a PS4 games room, and chill-out areas.
- Salary review twice a year with opportunities for promotions and spot awards.
- Yearly Training Budget up to 5 million VND per staff.
- Culture of recognition with monthly rewards for those with the most kudos.
- All office benefits and full salary during probation.
- Flexible starting time up to 10 AM working Monday - Friday with no overtime and a long lunch break.
- Two days remote every week taken on any days you choose so you can work from wherever you like.
- Full Vietnamese holidays off with 12 annual leave days per year with all days not taken paid out in cash.
- Yearly company trip, monthly team all-hands activities, welcome lunches for new members, the monthly budget for team celebrations.
- Celebrations for special days in the year, such as Women’s Day, YEP, Christmas.
- Gold level Health Insurance coverage from Bao Viet Insurance and a yearly complete Health Check.
- Employee-led clubs within the company; games teams, sports teams, etc.
- Buddy system, tech, and product talks, mentoring, and paid-for training for any skills you’d like to develop.
- Weekly agile sessions and professional coaching.
- Meal allowance, parking allowance, petrol allowance, and unlimited snacks and coffee every day.
- Options for a full MAC or PC set-up are completely provided.

Where We Work

HCMC Head Office: Level 8, Vina Building, 131 Xo Viet Nghe Tinh, Gia Dinh Ward

Hanoi Office: 37 Lê Văn Thiêm, Thanh Xuân Ward

Da Nang Office: Level 8, Bach Dang Complex, 50 Bach Dang, Hai Chau Ward, Da Nang City

title: Technical Project Manager
reasons:

jobDescription:
- Lead and oversee the end-to-end delivery of software development projects, ensuring alignment with scope, timeline, quality, and budget requirements.
- Collaborate closely with developers, business analysts, product owners, and stakeholders to define technical and business requirements.
- Drive system architecture and solution design discussions for web, mobile, or backend systems to ensure scalability, maintainability, and performance.
- Manage and lead cross-functional development teams, monitor project progress, and provide regular updates to stakeholders.

requirements:

- Strong background in software development, including web development (frontend/backend) and/or mobile application development.
- Hands-on experience in system architecture design and software solution design.
- Proven experience leading and managing software development teams throughout the project lifecycle.
- Good understanding of software development methodologies such as Agile/Scrum.
- Experience in fintech, securities, e-banking, e-commerce, or SaaS environments is highly preferred. Knowledge of securities systems/business is a strong plus.
- Familiarity with project management tools such as Jira, Confluence, Asana, or similar platforms.
- Strong communication, leadership, stakeholder management, and problem-solving skills.
- Good English communication skills, both verbal and written.
benefits:

title: Senior AI Engineer (Machine Learning, Python)
jobDescription:
Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm Senior AI Engineer / Senior GenAI Backend Engineer có kinh nghiệm thực chiến để xây dựng, triển khai và tối ưu các hệ thống AI phục vụ sản phẩm của công ty. Vị trí này phù hợp với ứng viên có thể làm việc xuyên suốt từ nghiên cứu giải pháp, xây dựng AI backend, triển khai model hoặc AI service lên server, cho đến huấn luyện, fine tune và tối ưu model để phục vụ các yêu cầu riêng của công ty với chi phí hợp lý. Bạn sẽ tham gia phát triển các hệ thống AI cho nhiều bài toán thực tế như image generation, video generation, audio transcription, OCR, document understanding, LLM applications và các AI API services phục vụ sản phẩm hoặc hệ thống nội bộ.

Mô tả công việc

- Thiết kế và xây dựng AI backend systems cho các tính năng AI và GenAI của công ty
- Triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu các model hoặc AI services cho các bài toán như:Image generationVideo generationAudio transcriptionOCRDocument understandingLLM applications
- Xây dựng API backend để tích hợp model vào mobile app, web app hoặc hệ thống nội bộ
- Deploy model, AI service hoặc inference service lên server, cloud hoặc môi trường container như Docker và Kubernetes
- Thiết kế kiến trúc model serving đảm bảo tính ổn định, bảo mật, khả năng mở rộng và dễ giám sát trong môi trường production
- Tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống theo các tiêu chí như latency, throughput, GPU CPU utilization và cost per request
- Làm việc với open source models, self hosted models hoặc third party AI services để đưa vào vận hành thực tế
- Huấn luyện, fine tune hoặc custom model để phù hợp với dữ liệu, nghiệp vụ và yêu cầu riêng của công ty
- Xây dựng pipeline cho data preparation, training, evaluation, deployment và monitoring
- Nghiên cứu các giải pháp giúp tối ưu chi phí vận hành như:Lựa chọn model phù hợpTính toán chi phíBatchingCachingQuantizationDistillationFine tune đúng hướng thay vì dùng model lớn cho mọi tác vụ
- Phối hợp với product, engineering và business team để chuyển nhu cầu thực tế thành các AI solutions có thể vận hành ổn định và mở rộng lâu dài
- Theo dõi, debug và cải thiện chất lượng hệ thống AI trong môi trường production
requirements:
- Có từ 3 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên trong lĩnh vực AI, ML hoặc backend AI systems
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế 2 năm trở lên trong việc deploy AI hoặc ML models vào production
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế 3 năm trở lên xây dựng AI API backend, model serving systems hoặc inference services
- Thành thạo Python
- Biết thêm một ngôn ngữ khác là lợi thế
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với một hoặc nhiều framework như:PyTorchTensorFlowLang ChainHugging Face
- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hệ thống trên:Linux serverCloud platformDockerKubernetesGPU environment
- Có kinh nghiệm với một hoặc nhiều bài toán như:Image generationVideo generationSpeech to textAudio transcriptionOCRDocument understandingLLM applicationMultimodal AI
- Có kinh nghiệm fine tuning, custom training hoặc model adaptation để tối ưu model theo dữ liệu và yêu cầu riêng của công ty
- Hiểu rõ các trade off giữa chất lượng model, tốc độ phản hồi, độ phức tạp hệ thống và chi phí vận hành
- Có kinh nghiệm về MLOps hoặc LLMOps là một lợi thế, bao gồm:Model versioningCI CDMonitoringLoggingEvaluation
- Có tư duy sản phẩm, tư duy hệ thống và khả năng biến công nghệ AI thành giải pháp thực tế cho công ty

Điểm cộng

- Từng làm việc với open source models và tự host model
- Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu chi phí inference trên GPU server
- Có kinh nghiệm với:LoRAQuantizationDistillationFine tuning
- Các kỹ thuật tối ưu model để phục vụ production
- Từng xây hệ thống AI phục vụ lượng request lớn hoặc yêu cầu hiệu năng cao
- Có khả năng đề xuất kiến trúc, review kỹ thuật và đưa ra quyết định phù hợp cho AI backend

Giá trị bạn mang lại

- Giúp công ty triển khai AI nhanh hơn
- Kiểm soát chi phí tốt hơn
- Xây dựng các năng lực AI phù hợp với nghiệp vụ riêng
- Giảm phụ thuộc vào những giải pháp đắt đỏ hoặc thiếu linh hoạt

title: Frontend Engineer (Vue.js & Design Focus)
reasons:
- Onsite opportunities: Palo Alto,California,Finland
- Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team
- Attractive Income
jobDescription:
The Role We are looking for a Frontend Developer with a keen eye for design to join our CubiCasa Web Portal team. You will play a key role in building our customer-facing web applications, turning complex requirements into clean, user-friendly interfaces.

This role sits at the intersection of engineering and design. We need someone who not only writes clean Vue.js code but also understands modern web design patterns (responsive layouts, component reusability, smooth interactions) and can communicate effectively with our global team.

Note: We value practical results over theoretical knowledge. As part of our evaluation process, we will review your portfolio and examine live websites you have delivered to the real world.

🚀 Responsibilities

- Frontend Development: Develop and maintain features for our web portal using Vue.js (Vue 3) and TypeScript.
- Modern UI Implementation: Translate designs into responsive web interfaces that follow current trends in web application design (clean layouts, intuitive navigation, mobile-first thinking).
- API Integration: Connect the frontend to our backend services (RESTful APIs), handling data fetching, error states, and loading states gracefully.
- Media Performance: Optimize the handling of heavy media assets. You will ensure that uploading, processing, and viewing photos and videos is fast and seamless for the user.
- Collaboration: Communicate clearly in English with product managers, designers, and other developers to clarify requirements and solve problems.
- Component Library: Help build and maintain a reusable UI component library to ensure consistency across the application.
- Quality Assurance: Write clean, maintainable code and participate in code reviews to learn and share knowledge with the team.
requirements:
🎨 Who You Are

- Design-Savvy: You stay updated on modern web design trends. You know what makes a web app feel "modern" versus "dated."
- Clear Communicator: You are comfortable explaining your technical decisions and asking clarifying questions in English.
- User-Centric: You care about the end-user experience. You notice when a loading spinner is missing or when an error message is confusing.

✅ Essential Qualifications

- Portfolio of Live Work: You must provide a portfolio or links to active, real-world websites you have built. We will look at these to assess your attention to detail, UI/UX implementation, and overall quality.
- Experience: 3+ years of professional frontend development experience.
- Vue.js Proficiency: Solid understanding of Vue 3, Composition API, and its core principles.
- TypeScript: Practical experience using TypeScript in a production environment.
- Media Handling Optimization: Proven ability to handle performance challenges related to video/photo operations (large file uploads, efficient downloading, lazy loading, caching strategies).
- API Integration: Proven experience integrating RESTful APIs (handling GET/POST requests, authentication tokens, headers, etc.).
- State Management: Experience with modern state management libraries (Pinia or Vuex).
- Figma Competency: Familiarity with Figma (navigating files, inspecting element properties, exporting assets).
- Performance Optimization: Understanding of basic performance optimization techniques (lazy loading, code splitting, image optimization).
- CSS & Styling: Competence with modern CSS frameworks (Tailwind CSS is preferred) and responsive design principles.
- English Skills: Strong written and verbal English communication skills are required.

🌟 Nice-to-Have Skills

- Cloud & DevOps: Familiarity with AWS Cloud services and CI/CD integration for frontend deployment.
- Testing: Experience with frontend unit testing frameworks (e.g., Vitest, Jest, or Cypress).
- AI-Assisted Development: Familiarity with AI coding tools like GitHub Copilot or Cursor to accelerate development workflows.
- Experience building or maintaining a design system.
benefits:
Office exchange opportunities: (Palo Alto, California, Finland)

Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team

Attractive Income

Trending technology

jobDescription:
The Product Innovation & Strategy Manager is responsible for driving product innovation, strategic planning, and business growth initiatives for the company’s payment solutions ecosystem. This role focuses on identifying market opportunities, developing innovative payment products, services and aligning product strategy with company business objectives.

Key Responsibilities

1. Product strategy & innovation

- Define long-term strategic direction for SmartSME product
- Identify emerging opportunities in SME digital banking, embedded finance and AI driven lending.
- Build product positioning aligned with the group ecosystem strategy
- Drive continuous product enhancement and innovation initiatives.

2. Ecosystem Development

- Design ecosystem integration strategies across lending products, insurance, CRM and third-party SME services.
- Identify ecosystem partnership opportunities.
- Drive merchant engagement and ecosystem stickiness initiatives

3. Research and Market intelligence

- Conduct research on SME operational behaviors and pain points
- Benchmark global SME supper-app and digital banking models
- Analyze market trends, fintech innovations and regulatory changes

4. AI & data driven product innovation

Collaborate with data and AI teams/tools to develop alternative credit scoring, AI recommendation engines, approval prediction frameworks and merchant prioritization models.

title: Staff Engineer
reasons:
- Build high impact and high value products
- Various types of projects available
- Work with talented team members
jobDescription:
Introduction

At RAKSUL, our vision is "Better Systems, Better World,". We aim to build a platform that supports the entire BtoB Japanese market. We position PMI (Post-Merger Integration) through M&A and the optimization of long-running systems across RAKSUL group platforms as key strategic priorities.

Mission

As a Staff Engineer, you will lead the technical direction and architectural design across RAKSUL group businesses, with a focus on technical due diligence, post-merger integration, and legacy system modernization. Your scope includes modernizing systems, embedding the Technology Life Cycle throughout the software development lifecycle, and integrating with RAKSUL's core platforms—including identity, payments, and data analytics. You will engage closely with stakeholders across internal teams and group companies, providing practical approaches and technical guidance. This role offers a clear career path toward Principal Engineer or Senior Architect, where you will strategically lead technical initiatives across multiple businesses.

Key responsibilities

- Lead technical due diligence (DD) for M&A target companies, assessing tech stack, infrastructure, security posture, SDLC maturity, and engineering organization to surface integration risks and effort estimates ahead of deal close.
- Define technical PMI goals, target architecture, and success metrics based on DD findings, aligned with RAKSUL group's platform strategy (identity, payments, data analytics).
- Partner with the PMO to translate DD outputs into an executable PMI roadmap before the PMI phase begins, so the team can mobilize from Day 1 of integration.
- Design architecture and integration approaches for post-merger products and legacy systems across RAKSUL group businesses.
- Break down high-level technical and architectural concepts into tangible approaches for team members and stakeholders.
- Modernize systems across DevOps, SRE, and cloud infrastructure.
- Collaborate with stakeholders across group businesses to provide technical guidance and mentorship.
- Deliver hands-on technical solutions through design reviews, code reviews, and troubleshooting.
- Partner with the Principal Engineer and PMO to plan and execute the Technology Life Cycle.
- Establish and enhance highly productive and reproducible SDLC and AI-DLC
requirements:
Basic Qualifications:

- 8+ years of software development experience using multiple frameworks such as Spring Boot, Gin, Ruby on Rails, Laravel, etc.
- 3+ years of architect or tech lead experience integrating three or more services in modern web technology.
- Strong experience in relational database design and migration using MySQL or PostgreSQL.
- Experience in AI native development process such as SDD.
- Hands-on experience operating cloud platforms and development tools, including AWS or GCP .
- Solid understanding of security design and implementation across application and infrastructure layers.
- Experience designing unit and E2E test strategies and implementing them.
- Designing and hands-on experience building and operating CI/CD workflows using tools such as GitHub Actions, Code Pipeline, etc.
- Business-level English communication skills, with experience working in cross-functional and multi-regional teams.

Nice to have:

- Experience in technical due diligence during M&A
- Experience modernizing or migrating large-scale legacy systems
- Experience leading technical initiatives across multiple teams or business domains
benefits:
- 15 annual days of a year, and also available during probation time
- Premium Private healthcare package
- Salary review TWICE a year with attractive performance bonus up to 2 months
- MacBook Pro, Ergonomic chairs, 140cm wide desk from your first working day
- Individually tailored learning and development plan
- Boost your English with in-house training by a native teacher
- Maintain work-life balance with in-house activities, sports clubs, and regular events.

title: Business Analyst (JIRA, Agile, SQL)
jobDescription:
A- Company Overview

Mercatus is a fast-growing global technology company leading the way in digital commerce for grocery retailers. Our all-in-one eCommerce platform empowers businesses to connect personally with shoppers through innovative omni-channel strategies. With proven technology and a team of industry experts, we help retailers boost transactions, increase sales, and build customer loyalty.

We’re proud to support hundreds of B2B and B2C clients across the US, Canada, Europe, and Israel. Our success is driven by a diverse team of passionate individuals who think big and strive for excellence in everything we do.

B- Job Description

· Gathering and analyzing business/system requirements; help prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRDs).

· Collaborate with Dev/QA and UI/UX teams to clarify user stories and support sprint delivery.

· Participate in requirement review, walkthroughs, and sign-off sessions with supervision.

· Communicate with internal stakeholders to validate expectations and clarify issues.

· Support the Project Manager in scoping, estimation, and planning activities for features or modules.

· Document change request and maintain requirement traceability throughout the project lifecycle.
requirements:

title: Principal QC Engineer
reasons:
- International environment - Onsite Opportinity
- Premium Personal Health Insurance
- 20 days Leave
jobDescription:
ABOUT THE ROLE

The Principal QC is responsible for developing and owning the strategy behind organisational QC processes, and driving quality, output, effectiveness, and consistency as a result.

Working closely with Development Managers, and Team Leaders, the Principal QC is a leadership role designed to both support and oversee QC activities across all squads.  A key objective of this role is to drive the adoption of AI-powered tools and test automation to reduce manual work and improve testing efficiency across the QC team.

SCOPE OF RESPONSIBILITY

- To champion a quality-first engineering culture.
- Define and implement the strategy for QC operations across six development squads, each with their own QC members.
- Lead initiatives to improve QC capability, automation adoption, output, and product quality.
- Ensure consistent testing standards, quality practices, and defect management across teams.
- Provide visibility of product quality and QC performance to engineering leadership and squad leaders.
- Oversee test coverage strategy beyond functional testing. Ie. Security and Performance.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Leadership

- Define and maintain QC standards, testing processes, and best practices across squads.
- Oversee testing activities to ensure adequate coverage across functional, integration, and system testing.
- Identify systemic quality risks and drive improvement initiatives.
- Ensure QC’s are supported with adequate tools, educational resources, devices, and test platforms.

Cross-Team Collaboration

- Work closely with Development Managers, and Team Leaders to ensure quality is embedded throughout the development lifecycle.
- Support squads in resolving complex testing challenges and clarifying requirements.
- Act as the central point of contact for quality-related matters across squads.
- Quality Review & Reporting
- Organize regular quality review meetings with QC members across squads.
- Consolidate testing results, defect trends, and testing coverage across teams.
- Provide quality insights and reports to leadership to support release readiness and risk management.

AI & Test Automation

- Drive the adoption of AI-powered tools and automation to support and improve upon all areas of the QC process.
- Identify opportunities for AI-assisted test case generation, regression testing, and defect analysis.
- Work with QC members and developers to increase test automation coverage across critical areas.
- Establish best practices for integrating AI and automation into QC workflows.

Team Development

- Mentor QC members across squads and support their professional development.
- Encourage knowledge sharing and improve testing practices across teams.
- Organize training sessions to strengthen QC capabilities.

Key Success Metrics

- Success in this role will be measured by improvements in product quality and testing efficiency, including:
- Increased automation coverage for critical product areas.
- Reduction in manual testing effort through AI and automation tools.
- Improved defect detection before release and reduced defect leakage into production.
- Stronger QC capability and consistent testing practices across squads.
- Improved visibility of performance, and quality throughout the QC process.
requirements:
- 7+ years of experience in software quality assurance or quality control.
- Strong experience in software quality assurance / quality control.
- Experience leading or mentoring QA/QC teams in Agile development environments.
- Strong knowledge of test strategy, defect management, and quality processes.
- Experience with test automation frameworks.
- Experience with AI-assisted tools for uplifting QC outcomes.
- Experience with CI/CD tools and shift-left concepts.
- Knowledge of API testing tools, microservices, and regression testing.
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments.
- Familiarity with SQL or database validation techniques.
- Excellent communication, leadership, and cross-team collaboration skills.
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
- ISTQB certification is a plus.
benefits:
We are our people, and whilst as a business we make software, as an organization, we make some of the industry’s best! Joining the team you will work with the engineers around the world from BMW, Mercedes, Honda, Porches, Hyundai …

1 WORKING HOURS

- Working hours is flexible and the standard guideline is between 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM with 1 hour break for lunch.
- Staff can start early and finish early to keep in sync with Australia working hours

2 LEAVES

- 12 days Annual Leave per annum. Annually leave is accumulated up to 2 years.
- Additional one annual leave day for every five years of service
- Sick Leave: 5 days paid per annum.
- Compassionate Leave: 3 days per annum

3 HEALTHCARE

- Premium Personal Health Insurance package for full-time and permanent staff.
- Annual health check

4 BONUSES

- 13th month bonus
- Loyalty reward Program (Bonus for every 3 years, 5 years of service)
- Project/ Performance Bonus

5 OTHER BENEFITS, ALLOWANCES AND INCENTIVES

- 100% salary during Probation Period
- Fully sponsored onsite trip to Titan international offices (AU, Thailand, UAE, EU etc.)
- Gifts on special occasions + holidays (Tet, Full-moon festival, Birthday, Christmas etc.)
- Employee Referral Program
- Internal events every month (Happy lunch, Milk tea Friday, etc.)
- Sport Activity Funding (Football every Tuesday & Thursday)
- Education Funding

title: AppSec (DevOps/ DevSecOps) Engineer
jobDescription:
Introduction

Con Cung is the biggest omni-channel company for mom & baby with 600 retail stores in Vietnam in 2021 and plan to have 1,000 stores by 2023 with 1 billion USD revenue. Con Cung's annual growth rate is more than 70%. With the vision of providing good quality products for children, Con Cung is strongly investing into Product Research and Development in order to manufacture and provide products that are suitable to the local market in terms of pricing and quality. We also invest into technology in order to manage the network and online channel efficiently.

Con Cung Corporation also develops in-house cutting-edge automation and intelligence technologies. We are seeking for young, smart & dynamic talents to grow your career together with us.

Job Description

We are seeking an AppSec/DevSecOps Engineer to help establish and mature our application security and secure development practices. This role will initially focus on standardizing our DevOps pipelines and progressively integrate security into every stage of the software lifecycle. The engineer will support secure software design, application security testing, and developer enablement programs, with the long-term goal of leading our AppSec capability.

Key Responsibilities

- DevOps Standardization: Streamline and standardize the company’s CI/CD pipelines for cybersecurity projects, preparing the foundation for DevSecOps integration.
- Secure SDLC Integration: Embed security controls and checks into software development workflows, from design to deployment.
- Application Security Testing: Implement and maintain SAST, DAST, SCA, and other testing tools within pipelines; triage and coordinate fixes with developers.
- Developer Training & Security Champions: Deliver secure coding training, support Security Champions program, and promote security awareness among developers.
- Security by Design: Collaborate with architects and product teams to ensure applications are designed with security principles in mind (Threat Modeling, Secure Design Review, Security Requirement).
- Framework & Maturity Models: Contribute to the adoption of industry standards and frameworks such as OWASP SAMM for measuring and improving software assurance maturity.
- Continuous Improvement: Proactively recommend enhancements to DevSecOps tools, processes, and policies to improve resilience and efficiency.
requirements:
- 2-3+ years of experience with DevOps practices (CI/CD, containerization, cloud-native deployment).
- Experience with DevSecOps integration in modern pipelines (GitLab CI, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, etc.).
- Familiarity with application security testing tools (SAST, DAST, SCA, dependency scanning).
- Knowledge of secure software development practices (threat modeling, secure design principles, OWASP Top 10).
- Strong scripting/automation skills (Python, Bash, or similar).
- Excellent collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to work closely with developers, architects, and operations teams.
- A proactive attitude & the ability to think outside of the box
- Works in an organised, structured manner
- Can do attitude, gets things done
- Excellent communication skills with diverse audiences
- Strong critical thinking and analytical skills
- Exposure to security frameworks such as OWASP SAMM, BSIMM, or NIST SSDF.
- Experience delivering developer training or mentoring Security Champions.
- Familiarity with infrastructure as code security (Terraform, Kubernetes, Helm).
- Cloud security knowledge (AWS, Azure, GCP).
- English communication.
benefits:

jobDescription:
BE A MAKER

At Simpson Strong-Tie, we've built a workplace where people are connected and engaged in creative thinking from day one throughout their careers.

When you think of the best a family has to offer - support, collaboration and respect - that's what we value at Simpson Strong-Tie. When there's a win, we'll cheer you on. When there's a snag, coworkers step in to help you out. Working on solutions together is just the way we do things here, and that creates an atmosphere that often feels like home.

At Simpson Strong-Tie, you'll find talented, passionate, dedicated, humble and genuinely kind people who are all connected by our shared mission - to provide solutions that help people design and build safer, stronger structures.

It's this mission and our strong people-focused values that have made Simpson Strong-Tie a unique place to work for more than 70 years - a place where you can connect, create and build your career. We invite you to learn more about our culture and why our employees are our most loyal customers.

YOU

You are a passionate, but pragmatic Scrum Master who believes in Agile and the Continuous Improvement mentality. You take pride in fostering a collaborative and supportive engineering culture. As a Scrum Master, you will be responsible for empowering your team to deliver best-in-class solutions to stakeholders:

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Building high-performing teams in product development.
- Driving the Agile mindset and collaboration across functional teams.
- Facilitating Scrum events and guiding team discussions, supporting decision-making, and resolving conflicts.
- Coaching team members on Agile-minded best practices for improvement.

- Aligning delivery plans with product roadmap and release plan.
- Managing team capacity and negotiating priorities with stakeholders.
- Managing risks, dependencies, and continuous improvement initiatives.
- Reporting status on milestones, deliverables, risks, and issues across leadership.
- Engaging stakeholders and managing their expectations through clear and consistent communication.
- Collaborating with other Scrum Masters for large-scale change initiatives
requirements:

- Proven experience facilitating Scrum ceremonies, supporting cross-functional collaboration, and driving continuous improvement initiatives.
- Familiarity with Jira backlog management and Agile reporting tools.
- Exceptional communication skills in English, both written and verbal.

jobDescription:
Founded in Switzerland in 1968, Zühlke is owned by its partners and located across Europe and Asia. We are a global transformation partner, with engineering and innovation in our DNA. We're trusted to help clients envision and build their businesses for the future – to run smarter today while adapting for tomorrow’s markets, customers, and communities. Our multidisciplinary teams specialise in tech strategy and business innovation, digital solutions and applications, and device and systems engineering. We excel in complex, regulated spaces including health and finance, connecting strategy, tech implementation, and operational services to help clients become more effective, resilient businesses.

If you share our values and want to do the best work, for the right reasons, we can offer you the chance to do it on a global scale and play a real role in shaping our exciting journey.

The role.

As a Quality Assurance Engineer, you will be a key member of our team, focused on creating next-generation solutions for our client’s colleagues and customers. Quality is a shared responsibility integrated from the start of the project, and you will be essential in providing timely feedback on the quality and viability of the services delivered. You will get support/training in the team to ensure you have all the tools and knowledge needed to excel in your role.

You will work closely with a product development team, offering guidance and feedback to ensure high-quality service delivery from the beginning. As a reflective partner, you will provide critical insights into the quality of their work at pivotal stages. While a deep understanding of testing techniques is important, this role is not about traditional testing. Instead, it centers on empowering others to incorporate quality into their processes before any code is written.

If you are passionate about meeting user needs and thrive in a collaborative environment, this role presents opportunities for career growth and learning from industry experts. Join a forward-thinking company that uses digital solutions to make a significant impact. This position is perfect for someone eager to contribute to building quality services and enhancing user experiences while advancing their career in a supportive, innovative environment.

How you'll make impact

- Create and maintain automated test cases, test plans and test framework ensuring that they are up to date with requirements and policy changes
- Create, maintain and improve the automated test framework and test environments
- Conduct testing on new features and file defects
- Perform various tests such as manual/functional/performance/exploratory tests and support UATs
- Assist in resolving production cases

If you feel you don't meet all the requirements, we are still happy to get to know you, learn more about your ambitions and ideas and look forward to receiving your application!

We welcome people from all backgrounds, regardless of their gender, personality, national origin, race, religion, colour, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, marital status, disability or veteran status.

title: Senior AI Agent Engineer - Up to 100M
reasons:
- Dynamic work environment with experienced leaders
- Competitive salary,benefits package including ESOP
- Career advancement opportunities
jobDescription:
ABOUT US

Finan is building Southeast Asia's leading AI-powered business platform to help small  and mediumenterprises (SMEs)manage,operate,andgrow with confidence.

Our flagship product:

• SoBanHang – Vietnam's #1 sales and business management app for micromerchants and household businesses.

• FinanBook – A modern financial and accounting management platform that helps SMEs automate banking and smart accounting.

About the Product

We're building an AI-native operating platform — multi-tenant, multi-region, multivertical. This isn't "bolting AI onto an existing product." We're rebuilding from the ground up  with AI as the core operating layer, serving multiple industries across multiple countries, with  high transaction volume and strict accuracy/audit requirements.

The AI layer is the core value driver, not a side feature:

• Outcome agents — measured by real business results, billed pay-per-result

• Copilot streaming chat with rich content blocks (text / table / chart / action proposals / citations) + tool-use orchestration

• Voice-to-form with per-form vocabulary tuning for field workers

• Workflow Engine running AI activities as service tasks (decision, dispatch, webhook)

• Rule-first → Agent fallback for high-volume matching and classification pipelines

What You'll Do

• Own a product capability end-to-end: business objective → spec → architecture → build → deploy → measure

• Design and ship AI agents with clear success signals tied to measurable business outcomes

• Orchestrate tool-use on leading LLM APIs: define tool schemas, manage conversation state, handle streaming, prompt caching, per-tenant token budgets

• Build Copilot streaming chat that returns rich content blocks — integrated with BFF, rendered as action buttons / tables / charts on the frontend

• Integrate workflow orchestration for long-running agents (multi-step, retry/compensation, human approval gates)

• Measure and optimize: cost per outcome, p95 latency, success rate, hallucination rate,  prompt cache hit rate — every agent ships with a dashboard

• Build RAG pipelines for tenant knowledge bases

• Implement guardrails: tenant isolation, PII redaction, capability gating, full audit trails

• Write technical specs before writing code: BRD, data model, API contract, ADR

How We Work

A few things that are genuinely different here:

• Spec before code. Every feature starts with a written plan — brainstorm, writing plan, then execution. We don't figure it out as we go.

• Eval-driven AI. Every prompt change ships with before/after evals. We don't deploy on vibes.

• Verify before done. "Seems to work" doesn't count. Tests run, outputs checked, then it's done.

• Multi-vertical by default. Every design decision gets stress-tested against one question:

"What if a tenant from a different industry or country onboards tomorrow?" No verticalspecific assumptions baked in.

• Modules first, services later. New domains default to a module inside an existing service. We only split when the boundary is clear enough to justify it.

• Code review that actually means something. Automated toolchain plus peer review.

Nothing merges unreviewed
requirements:
Must-have

• 5+ years as a senior software engineer — building and maintaining real production systems, not just prototypes

• 2+ years working with LLM APIs in production — live systems, real users, real incidents you've debugged and fixed

• Fluent in Python or Go, comfortable writing both

• TypeScript + React — enough to build Copilot UI, streaming renders, and action block components

• Deep understanding of tool use / function calling: schema design, conversation loops, error handling, streaming

• Disciplined prompt engineering: versioning, evals, A/B testing — not just "write a prompt until it works"

• Prompt caching: know when you hit vs miss, and how to structure prompts to maximize cache hit rate

• Strong SQL: transactions, indexes, row-level security, query optimization; understand OLTP vs OLAP

• Ability to design service-level architecture: data flow, API contracts, storage models, integration points — and articulate trade-offs clearly

• Experience integrating external APIs with quirks: schema drift, idempotency, retry logic, reconciliation between sources of truth

• Understand multi-tenancy: tenant isolation, per-tenant quotas, capability gating at the DB and application layer

• Can write technical specs clear enough for others to implement without hand-holding

• Outcome-driven mindset: success means the business outcome is achieved, not that the feature shipped

Not a fit if

• You've only built side projects or hackathon demos — no production systems with real users

• You only own the AI layer and can't take responsibility for backend or frontend

• You think "AI agent" means longer prompts or chaining more LLM calls

• You don't have an eval framework — you test by chatting and seeing if it "looks right"

• You're not comfortable reading long specs (avg 500–2,000 lines) before writing code

• You can't commit to full-time onsite in Ho Chi Minh City
benefits:
• Genuinely hard technical problems — you're not wrapping ChatGPT. You're building AI agents measured by real business outcomes on a complex multi-tenant platform

• Real ownership — from spec to ship to maintain, not broken into mechanical tickets

• Spec-first, no pointless meetings — flexible working hours, focused on output

• Personal LLM API budget for learning and experimentation

• Access to our full internal AI tooling stack

• Hardware support — machine and monitor provided at the office

• Competitive compensation by level (Senior / Staff) — discussed after Round 1

• A team that's serious about engineering — real code reviews, eval-driven development, no deploying on gut feeling

- Phát triển các phần mềm theo công nghệ .NET, ứng dụng InternetBanking, Mobile Banking, ứng dụng Web, các dự án liên quan đến CoreBanking, hệ thống Thẻ, hệ thống thanh toán và các ứng dụng tại quầy giao dịch.

- Xây dựng các API, services phục vụ tích hợp các hệ thống CNTT VRB.

- Tham gia cải tiến và chuyển đổi số: Đề xuất cải tiến hệ thống, nâng cao trải nghiệm người dùng, tham gia xây dựng kiến trúc microservice, cloud (nếu có).

- Nghiên cứu giải pháp công nghệ phần mềm mới, đề xuất triển khai cho VRB: AI, Open Banking, Digital Plaform.

- Tham gia kiểm thử và đảm bảo chất lượng, tính ổn định, bảo mật và hiệu năng của ứng dụng.

- Tham gia dự án CNTT của VRB.

- Phối hợp, hỗ trợ các bộ phận khác trong quá trình triển khai và vận hành hệ thống phần mềm ứng dụng CNTT.
requirements:
Trình độ đào tạo:

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên.

- Chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, Tin học ứng dụng, Điện tử viễn thông, Hệ thống thông tin, Khoa học máy tính, Điện tử viễn thông hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan.

Yêu cầu kinh nghiệm:

- Có kiến thức về ngôn ngữ lập trình như .NET, Java, PHP, lập trình ứng dụng mobile, lập trình web hoặc tương đương.

- Có kiến thức về cơ sở dữ liệu, ngôn ngữ SQL như Oracle, Ms SQL Server, My SQL, …

- Có kiến thức về REST API, Microservice.

- Ưu tiên có các chứng chỉ như: Oracle Certified Professional Java Developer, Scrum/Agile, ISTQB Foundation, AWS/Azure hoặc các chứng chỉ container–Kubernetes phù hợp với môi trường phát triển hiện đại.

- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai dự án theo mô hình Agile, DevOps , DevSecOps, là một lợi thế.

Ngoại ngữ: Chứng chỉ tiếng Anh tương đương trình độ B1 trở lên theo khung tham chiếu trình độ ngoại ngữ chung Châu Âu.

Yêu cầu khác:

- Có kinh nghiệm phát triển hệ thống ngân hàng, tài chính hoặc Fintech.

- Hiểu biết cơ bản về bảo mật ứng dụng, hiệu năng của hệ thống.

- Kỹ năng phối hợp, làm việc nhóm tốt, Chủ động, trách nhiệm, chịu được áp lực công việc.

Tuổi: Không quá 40 tuổi.
benefits:

- Có cơ hội thăng tiến cao, được làm việc trong môi trường thân thiện, sáng tạo và phát triển.
- Được tham gia các chương trình đào tạo nghiệp vụ của Ngân hàng.
- Được chi bổ sung thu nhập theo kết quả làm việc, vị trí công việc và hưởng các cơ chế khuyến khích theo quy định của VRB.

title: C# Developer (AI-First)
reasons:
- Global growth with experienced engineers
- Innovative, balanced, creative culture
- Competitive salary, benefits, training
jobDescription:
CRM Service is looking for experienced C# Developers (AI-First) to join our project implementation team. You will work closely with a Product Owner and Team Lead based in Finland, alongside a Senior Integration Tech Lead, serving Nordic non-profit organisation (NPO) customers.

We need engineers who go beyond writing code - people who think deeply, take ownership, and build solutions that genuinely make a difference for our customers.

The Role & Team

You will be an active member of a small, focused implementation team. Your day-to-day work involves building and maintaining and integrating backend systems that power real customer outcomes - not internal tooling. The team operates with a high degree of trust and expects you to take initiative.

- Work directly on customer-facing projects in the Nordic NPO segment together with Product Owners, Project managers and Support people
- Collaborate with a tight-knit, senior-level team across Finland
- Contribute to both architecture decisions and hands-on implementation
- English is the working language - no Finnish required
- We require a minimum of 3 years of professional development experience. This role is not suitable for junior developers.

Technical Skills

Required

- Strong, proven experience with C# and the .NET ecosystem
- Solid back-end development skills — REST APIs, service design, and integration patterns
- Hands-on experience building AI-first applications: integrating LLMs, building agentic workflows, or designing AI-native architecture — not just wrapping an API call.

Nice to Have

- Familiarity with CRM, ESP, or marketing technology platforms is a plus
- Experience with integration hubs or middleware platforms is a plus

The Mindset We Value

- You think outside the box — when everyone else follows the obvious path, you ask: "Can we do this smarter with longer-lasting results?"
- You see the big picture and understand how your work connects to and impacts other parts of the system
- You‘re proactive and self-directed — you don‘t wait to be told what to do next
- You care about customer outcomes, not just technical correctness
requirements:
Communication

- Fluent, professional English — written and spoken
- Able to articulate technical ideas clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
- Comfortable collaborating with an international, remote-first team culture

Experience requirements

We require a minimum of 3 years of professional development experience. This role is not suitable for junior developers.

We accept experience from:

- Professional employment as a developer in a company
- Self-published or open-source projects that demonstrate real-world scope and quality

Formal education is not a requirement — your track record speaks for itself.
benefits:
Why you’ll love working here:

- You‘ll work on meaningful, real-world problems at the intersection of backend engineering and AI - for customers who rely on these systems to drive their mission.
- If you‘re the kind of developer who sees AI as a fundamental shift in how software is built (not just a feature to bolt on), this is the right team for you.

What will you get?

Join our innovative and market-leading Scandinavian SaaS company and accelerate your growth alongside experienced software engineers from around the world. We value creativity, innovation, and work-life balance in our Scandinavian work culture, and offer a competitive salary with 100% official salary during the probation period, annual reviews, and 13th month salary.

We prioritize the well-being of our employees with premium healthcare and accident insurance, as well as a wellness package to help you stay healthy and wealthy. You'll also have the chance to participate in exciting company outings, team-building activities, and on-site training opportunities in the Nordic region.

Work in a modern and supportive environment where your individuality is valued, and collaborate with a talented team on a mission to become global players in the industry.

title: Junior Test Developer (C#, Python, Linux, Networking)
jobDescription:
At Motorola Solutions we are helping solve some of the biggest challenges around safety and physical security by developing advanced artificial intelligence (AI) technologies and products that are used to help keep people, businesses, and cities around the world safer. Motorola Solution’s Video Division designs, develops, and manufactures advanced AI, video analytics, network video management software and hardware, surveillance cameras, and access control solutions that help change the way people interact with their security systems.

Our co-ops don’t wash cars or do coffee runs. They also don’t work on side projects. Our co-ops are treated like full team members and are given the opportunity to learn what being a computer engineer is like in the real world. You’ll have the opportunity to learn new technologies and best practices in product development including coding, testing, and automation. You’ll also have a lot of fun and make a lot of friends. For the duration of your work term, you will be a member of a multi-disciplinary engineering team responsible for the design and validation of the next generation of Motorola’s market-leading high-performance video solutions products.

The appliance testing team at Motorola are responsible for recommending, validating, automating, and performance testing platforms that are used to deploy our world-class Avigilon Control Center software product. Gain hands-on experience in a dynamic and innovative environment, work on projects that make a real-world impact, and collaborate with a talented and supportive team. Join us at Motorola Solutions and be part of a team that's making a difference in the world of safety and security!

Responsibilities include:

- Continually improve the quality of Avigilon’s software and hardware products through the creation, execution, and maintenance of comprehensive test plans, test cases, and test scripts
- Ensure that Avigilon produces the highest quality, easiest to use products in the surveillance industry
- Report defects using JIRA
- Measure and report on the performance of various components of our system
- Identify and make recommendations to remove performance bottlenecks
- Develop and document internal tools to aid testing and development teams
- Verify resolution of defects and support issues
- Setup and maintain complex test environments
requirements:
- Excellent written and oral communication skills, including the ability to produce clear, concise documentation
- Self-motivated, with the ability to learn quickly and independently
- Ability to work as part of a cross-functional team
- Excellent problem solving and critical thinking skills
- Some understanding of C#, Powershell, Python, Linux/Shell, IP Networking would be an asset
- Bachelor Degree in Science, Engineering or any relevant field

Preference will be given to candidates with the following skills and experience:

- General computer knowledge of items like: RAID, BIOS, Firmware, PCIe, etc.
- Prior experience installing and configuring NVR’s, computers or network equipment
- Knowledge of client/server architectures
- Knowledge of video file formats and related concepts
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …
- Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law
- The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination
- Award for marriage, newborn
- We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year
- You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path
- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active
- We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,...
- Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

title: Senior Fullstack Developer (NodeJS, TypeScript)
reasons:
- We truly value your thoughts and opinions
- Global and professional
- Hybrid working, flexible time
jobDescription:
ABOUT US:

At Gradion, we are the strategic partner for ambitious businesses, helping them achieve breakthrough growth through Digital Innovation and Deep Tech.

With a global vision and an AI-first approach, we enable clients to reshape strategies, optimize systems, and adopt cutting-edge technologies to create sustainable value.

From AI and data to cybersecurity, robotics, and large-scale enterprise platforms, Gradion designs practical solutions that lay the foundation for the next generation of billion-dollar companies.

OUR FACTS & FIGURES:

- 23+ years of expertise - Gradion builds digital platforms & deep-tech solutions.

- 3 continents: Asia, Europe and Africa.

- 300+ specialists across 6 countries Vietnam, Singapore, Thailand, Saudi Arabia, Germany and Egypt.

- 100+ enterprise clients, including several unicorns (e.g., Alaiko, HomeToGo, Roadsurfer).

- Vietnam’s Best IT Company – recognized by ITViec for 8 consecutive years, including 2 consecutive years of ranking #1 (2024 and 2025).

- ISO 27001.

We're looking for a Senior Fullstack Developer to join our team and take ownership of building, optimizing, and scaling high-performing e-commerce experiences. You'll work across the fullstack - from Shopify storefront UX to backend integrations and payment systems with a direct impact on conversion, reliability, and global reach.

In this role, you will

- Build and improve UI/UX across Shopify storefronts with a mobile-first approach, serving over 90% mobile traffic
- Manage and scale multi-currency and multi-language storefront setups
- Develop new features that improve store performance, subscription UX, and overall conversion rates
- Run A/B tests and implement tracking to continuously refine user interactions
- Maintain and extend payment gateway integrations (Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, Stripe, Klarna, and more)
- Own backend reliability through robust monitoring, error tracking, and webhook event logging
- Enhance internal Shopify Admin tooling for a smoother operational experience
requirements:
- 8+ years of software development experience, with strong hands-on TypeScript and Node.js
- Deep JavaScript fundamentals - async execution order, what your framework actually does under the hood.
- Strong general fundamentals of modern web applications - how apps render in the browser, rendering strategies, how to make the customer experience smooth and fast, and how frontend, backend, and multiple systems communicate — especially in a global e-commerce context
- Production experience in React or Vue (and Next.js or Nuxt) - depth in one matters more than shallow exposure to both; you should be able to explain what your framework does under the hood
- Familiarity with AWS - you can reason about how an application is deployed and served (compute, CDN, storage, secrets); experience on another cloud and mapping the concepts across is just as good
- Daily, hands-on use of Git, CI/CD pipelines, and agile workflows.
- Be the driver, not a passive coder - you propose solutions, sketch the architecture, and challenge requirements that don't make sense.
- Strong written and spoken English - the role involves daily collaboration with international stakeholders; clear, structured, to-the-point communication in technical discussions and async writing
- Active engagement in team ceremonies and confident contribution to technical discussions
- Willingness and ability to learn the Shopify ecosystem - you don't need Shopify experience on day one, but you must be genuinely curious and motivated to build it

Nice-to-Have

- Shopify Functions, Shopify APIs, or Checkout UI Extensions experience
- End-to-end testing exposure (Playwright, Cypress)
- A/B testing and analytics/tracking tools
- Multi-currency / multilingual storefront setups
- Payment gateway integration experience
- Deep cross-browser and cross-platform troubleshooting
benefits:
Why you’ll love working here:

🏆 Join Vietnam’s Best IT Company – Gradion Vietnam (formerly NFQ Vietnam) was recognized by ITViec for 8 consecutive years, including 2 successive years as the Winner. Work with some of the best minds in the industry and be part of a company that’s redefining how businesses scale through technology.

🌍 Career Growth & Leadership Opportunities – At Gradion, your growth transcends job titles. Collaborate directly with our leadership team, receive mentorship from seasoned experts, and tackle real-world business challenges across tech, consulting, or operations. When you’re ready to advance - whether as a specialist or leader - we’re committed to fueling your success.

🚀 AI-First Innovation & Strategic Consulting – We’re shaping a culture where AI is woven into how we think, create, and solve problems - not just a tool in our toolkit. With a consulting mindset, our teams deliver impactful, practical solutions that drive real value. Stay curious, think critically, and leverage AI to make a meaningful difference for clients and users.

💰 Competitive Compensation – We believe great talent deserves great rewards. Expect an attractive salary, performance-based bonuses, and a benefits package that reflects your impact. We value talent over salary budgets - exceptional contributions deserve exceptional rewards.

✨ And Many More Benefits to Explore! But most importantly, a healthy work-life balance and an environment where you can thrive -professionally and personally. Including:

- A laptop is provided.
- Community Tech activities.
- A fun & dynamic environment and freedom to be creative.
- Modern office with a flexible, relaxing zone.
- Performance bonus (up to 2-month salary).
- Performance review 2 times/year.
- Extra Premium Healthcare & Annual Health-check.
- 15 days of annual leave.
- Working time: Monday – Friday (9 AM - 6 PM)

With the key missions of offering an environment that enables colleagues to demonstrate their capabilities, focus on their work and create value & delivering the “invaluable” office operation services & solutions that contributes to a company’s business success.
